name: Barbara Grassley
subject: My husband needs your help : )
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
A message from me to you.

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=849ba1325f0a4a38a5a16a6be2df2225&_e=uap3kRytRGxkAPqOSueRzvcZZ-K4Do83zLFM_OwozNBaw5GE_CRuyypIvHAPLL1DztR3SKbP3Eb3zPoRSj1ntm3fgsvwVpLRjds_Inw0J3WZZaT1KWUMezEj4G8tjOzI_YufIf2TJwCnh7-YzGH3thp_77V3olIqbnHnEsWHIWeGTd2CQ9gt0stiJTIxYEcluFHxdX_PF9Q53PuapHMhXU3uuD0mrGuum3fyOfM6dkvJw8kN6WcD8u3qQYXTdrFV31Qv93NBqrZ2wjQR_e_T-_iS9ghGMpdIg01WEVr3X-A%3D)
---
Friend,

Thank you, thank you, thank you.

You may not know it -- but everything you've done to help my husband, Senator Chuck Grassley, has made you practically family to us here in the Grassley Family. I never could have imagined so much support he'd build up over the years, and I'm glad the American people have entrusted him to be a U.S. Senator.

Time sure does fly. It seems like just a few years ago, we were gearing up for Chuck's first election. But now, the 2024 election is less than a year away. The years go by fast, and as we pray for this country to change for the better, we must prepare for the long road ahead of us in the next 12 months.

Chuck's been across Iowa, making sure Republicans know they can't give up hope. This election is a must-win for Republicans, and he's doing everything in his power to make sure it goes smoothly.

**I wanted to surprise my husband tomorrow, so I 'm personally asking you if there is anything you can contribute to my husband's efforts to help Republicans win up and down the ballot in 2024 before midnight.
**
I just want Chuck to know we all appreciate his work in the Senate and what he's done for Republicans across the country. I want to give you an opportunity to let him know just how thankful we are for his hard work.

**[If you can spare $1, $5, or anything, I know he would appreciate just seeing that he's got your support, so please contribute and leave him a message below! ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=849ba1325f0a4a38a5a16a6be2df2225&_e=uap3kRytRGxkAPqOSueRzvcZZ-K4Do83zLFM_OwozNBaw5GE_CRuyypIvHAPLL1DztR3SKbP3Eb3zPoRSj1ntm3fgsvwVpLRjds_Inw0J3WZZaT1KWUMezEj4G8tjOzIzZqyPjvZRO8m73A-IxMBTM7TcKRAfXsT48ePb9RfkMELByXc_zjUTOj5plZNnD2Z0Xiqd8Tls-PKtnYrJpcMH9javNd7tLAuNgeXRFqBVN_QZ7Ch_Z3IibXniRdwyRy7TJ447FMcw3Mcvp02sFwfGe45QiemlOFFSCpGK9Q_mQs%3D)
**
| [**CLICK HERE** ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=849ba1325f0a4a38a5a16a6be2df2225&_e=uap3kRytRGxkAPqOSueRzvcZZ-K4Do83zLFM_OwozNBaw5GE_CRuyypIvHAPLL1DztR3SKbP3Eb3zPoRSj1ntm3fgsvwVpLRjds_Inw0J3WZZaT1KWUMezEj4G8tjOzI6J4Rg2KJS3rJ7UbgGnVWKNgGh6-TjBRjW_M2qnRWE4wyLw3QClRHGae9wmgRC4v5Fgh9x5wbhPOcPynUfUt4aFbDQX3PRPKfEp7J6VYEE4ivHRny_DvrXXo0a6UuXbd6ZvaEgOHt-wfor-Fj4E_oKvUoDMV2LgPoGNFcArQABPg%3D)
---

Best,

Barbara Grassley

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: from my family to yours

body:
Peter, I want to tell you how appreciative I am that you’re a key member of my extended family. I couldn’t ask for a better grassroots team. Supporters like you will be vital to helping us take back the House in 2024, and I couldn’t be more grateful.
https://www.instagram.com/cleancookingcongresswoman/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/cleancookingcongresswoman/?hl=en]
One of my family’s favorite traditions is to cook Thanksgiving dinner together, so I thought I’d pass along a delicious recipe that we love.

I hope you have a wonderful time safely celebrating the holiday with loved ones tomorrow.

Thanks,

Debbie

P.S. If you’d like to see more recipes, please follow me on Instagram: @cleancookingcongresswoman. [https://www.instagram.com/cleancookingcongresswoman/?hl=en]

clean_body: Peter, I want to tell you how appreciative I am that you’re a key member of my extended family. I couldn’t ask for a better grassroots team. Supporters like you will be vital to helping us take back the House in 2024, and I couldn’t be more grateful. [] One of my family’s favorite traditions is to cook Thanksgiving dinner together, so I thought I’d pass along a delicious recipe that we love. I hope you have a wonderful time safely celebrating the holiday with loved ones tomorrow. Thanks, Debbie P.S. If you’d like to see more recipes, please follow me on Instagram: @cleancookingcongresswoman. [] SWEET POTATO PIE BREAD INGREDIENTS 11⁄2 cup all-purpose flour 1 teaspoon baking powder 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon 1⁄2 teaspoon ground nutmeg 1⁄4 teaspoon baking soda 1⁄4 teaspoon salt 1⁄2 cup butter 3⁄4 cup granulated sugar 1⁄4 cup light-brown sugar 1 teaspoon vanilla extract 1 cup plain leftover mashed sweet potatoes 2 large eggs BROWNED BUTTER GLAZE: 1⁄4 cup butter 1 cup powdered sugar 2-3 tablespoons milk Pecans DIRECTIONS 1. Preheat oven to 325 F. Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan. Set aside. In a large bowl beat butter, sugars, and vanilla until light and fluffy. Blend in sweet potatoes; then eggs, one at time. With mixer on low, add flour mixture in thirds; blend just enough to combine. 2. 3. Spoon batter into a prepared loaf pan. Bake until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 60-75 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack to cool, about 15 minutes. Remove cake from pan to cool completely. 4. 5. To make the glaze, add butter to a heavy saucepan. Cook butter over medium heat until it starts to foam, stirring frequently. Stop stirring, and let it continue to cook until amber brown. Remove from heat, and stir in powdered sugar and enough milk to make glaze desired consistency. If your powdered sugar is lumpy, sifting it will help make the glaze smoother. 6. Drizzle over cooled bread. Top with chopped pecans, if desired. PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC, 315 INSPIRATION LANE, GAITHERSBURG, MD 20878. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ecfa71aa912429684da8e2ce4ac8a9f&_e=GcO7-mbi20aeC-AL3RR0YeRNZZJCo7Z3Zt3PA5acfVWJjMv9vNW1wVcFbJfS28hg3X4GBdazJHbSsYftJGngIiSO4Y9UCoeu3E-SaW_Zh4RER1eXu490CiVNurZW2ygdVfv-vxttS1KuriREPhEfJtPwb8jkhhJlI8S5zbGccp8q5yXNIV9rIUNF9mMUvpUtCCUnZCOS4MTYY_pWmjzYT7qUjvPmdHjlZJfo0HnUStOVeGVeYS_aDXr16kqNm-bU1CNhrEmFymwGMnRhxjUzFBFa4WLdUbi6-FdAUUcpNpqzhzg9B5R3EHLUe2gNopRWZ4iH4Whj4bWHnk_GWIM1GlhzpbhWwalkQnXLltVkGEs%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ecfa71aa912429684da8e2ce4ac8a9f&_e=GcO7-mbi20aeC-AL3RR0YeRNZZJCo7Z3Zt3PA5acfVWJjMv9vNW1wVcFbJfS28hg3X4GBdazJHbSsYftJGngIiSO4Y9UCoeu3E-SaW_Zh4RER1eXu490CiVNurZW2ygdVfv-vxttS1KuriREPhEfJtPwb8jkhhJlI8S5zbGccp83a1q8uDv_fwAx4bE5HdHwW1prGnKWJIbkaw9Bs2Ao7RrU6jwrzdfEY16R8BP4Kp61JyOnxB4Vf467PkspOEyBBlN-lnTTIjvyDn6rVJMv1ugF6v8lW8Qdy2E_SbL5FxHL9PtLh0D2lpneXYGBmPGiUVhicqIDqTYa9UrqJS6zHl8lELj-bBp-it2jGuoHyAk%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ecfa71aa912429684da8e2ce4ac8a9f&_e=GcO7-mbi20aeC-AL3RR0YeRNZZJCo7Z3Zt3PA5acfVWJjMv9vNW1wVcFbJfS28hg3X4GBdazJHbSsYftJGngIiSO4Y9UCoeu3E-SaW_Zh4RER1eXu490CiVNurZW2ygdVfv-vxttS1KuriREPhEfJtPwb8jkhhJlI8S5zbGccp83a1q8uDv_fwAx4bE5HdHwm6XHzepBsGb_50BE9rCZkZEV2HhK3xcq8bk8GBNTFisSfdt9iarYQKnaYB5KintxvW4FpXhT-Qwgcthe3dxHqoOkn_oOfYZQKAtWOHwn52dqHyuKXmIUwUm2sabjM6M1KaZqWSPbyTH9-MKzVptEWPJU4PCiR0MhHOUhvB8ZnuY%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $10**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ecfa71aa912429684da8e2ce4ac8a9f&_e=GcO7-mbi20aeC-AL3RR0YeRNZZJCo7Z3Zt3PA5acfVWJjMv9vNW1wVcFbJfS28hg3X4GBdazJHbSsYftJGngIiSO4Y9UCoeu3E-SaW_Zh4RER1eXu490CiVNurZW2ygdVfv-vxttS1KuriREPhEfJtPwb8jkhhJlI8S5zbGccp83a1q8uDv_fwAx4bE5HdHwliWjTFwuKvgQKlbjTZRT2KnkpbT3WwidKVgch-bkl6WyZSB2z5R3ZtL0VE_OtiU9QZw84km8f8pLx1kiVm_k9k8k_8_gAM38K6olr_KbpH6ZbAH69Ye8fgaFfezHypA_U1J0Jbe5mAjqTdzoIIj2mEJKM0kVxCpsINqpC55wDPY%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $20**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ecfa71aa912429684da8e2ce4ac8a9f&_e=GcO7-mbi20aeC-AL3RR0YeRNZZJCo7Z3Zt3PA5acfVWJjMv9vNW1wVcFbJfS28hg3X4GBdazJHbSsYftJGngIiSO4Y9UCoeu3E-SaW_Zh4RER1eXu490CiVNurZW2ygdVfv-vxttS1KuriREPhEfJtPwb8jkhhJlI8S5zbGccp83a1q8uDv_fwAx4bE5HdHwOTrO3btVsFamZeZjJn1o6WAuy36K2y7q9l91CfyC3TBwt7m4qguh3IYtYbc9FWhsyeMQKCSja3Vh64xsi-Kqcc2SrCyChBEYbQYYajhy-LyGIzB-sDdLWPgNyIsc9G_E1PjU2nKU4ybyJjT9ZaMNCGcxJjaWwe1ieSH9Oza0qVY%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $50**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ecfa71aa912429684da8e2ce4ac8a9f&_e=GcO7-mbi20aeC-AL3RR0YeRNZZJCo7Z3Zt3PA5acfVWJjMv9vNW1wVcFbJfS28hg3X4GBdazJHbSsYftJGngIiSO4Y9UCoeu3E-SaW_Zh4RER1eXu490CiVNurZW2ygdVfv-vxttS1KuriREPhEfJtPwb8jkhhJlI8S5zbGccp83a1q8uDv_fwAx4bE5HdHwHzyUnQ0kOmJzTgCotwVX-d-25sMoKwI3NnBaRBFMFtRN4kNDEQbhxsEKPtvGdIkDbxtN2wsTWZmZ7nCF3sI7c0HznoP_51tPBlEq89WGelu5J15OHwiuAPtmNPbZu-DquddJoCHfamFDl3mAL9kk1BdmLWXut6JFqc-J4b6Rf9w%3D)
---
[**CONTRIBUTION OF $100**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ecfa71aa912429684da8e2ce4ac8a9f&_e=GcO7-mbi20aeC-AL3RR0YeRNZZJCo7Z3Zt3PA5acfVWJjMv9vNW1wVcFbJfS28hg3X4GBdazJHbSsYftJGngIiSO4Y9UCoeu3E-SaW_Zh4RER1eXu490CiVNurZW2ygdVfv-vxttS1KuriREPhEfJtPwb8jkhhJlI8S5zbGccp83a1q8uDv_fwAx4bE5HdHwm1kHBNNVuPvYmcipxYy10JVExMXyTUSDrkEQLMe4AdOnolToP-PrnmAlmM3FVU-liMKCYlmWJm6jOJ0kBm8FwqmbGpZ3whSzHLrKF3QwPiAO0w9lXXr0j1uALJYk6pnCCA-OACPEN-8c-kBQ8Ur3VKVD3bYkKfmwFm6ccvblgeU%3D)
---
Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me.

I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud.

Thank you & God bless.

**Pat Harrigan**
GOP Conservative Candidate
North Carolina's 14th District

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73837495/439808468/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGEyOGNiZmYtOWE4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3hpQ3m8SRIwU-j89drrK8auuEXHvd9tYaEQRq1G2jo=)
---
[**Friend, if you can’t spare a few minutes to read about why book bans are so dangerous, can you spare $10 and give my campaign the resources to defeat the extreme MAGA agenda? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73837496/439808469/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231122_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGEyOGNiZmYtOWE4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3hpQ3m8SRIwU-j89drrK8auuEXHvd9tYaEQRq1G2jo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73837497/439808470/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231122_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGEyOGNiZmYtOWE4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3hpQ3m8SRIwU-j89drrK8auuEXHvd9tYaEQRq1G2jo=)
_A young Raul Ruiz in Kindergarten, reciting the pledge of allegiance._ **Folks, when I was a kid, I loved to read.

I would read anything I could get my hands on.** Adventure books, comic books, cereal boxes, you name it. As I grew up, I read books that broadened my view of the world, challenged my ideas, and forced me to grow as a person.

I am, in part, the person I am today because of the experiences I gained while reading. I’m more empathetic, more understanding, and more willing to hear someone else’s point of view.

Which is why it terrifies me to see extreme MAGA Republicans all across the country (even in California!) pushing to ban books with just a passing mention of complicated topics or ideas that MAGA extremists find taboo.

Put plainly, team – these MAGA book bans are blatant attacks, not only on the free expression of authors and school children, but adults and society more broadly.

I’m fighting tooth-and-nail against ever increasing MAGA book bans, but we need to snuff out this bigoted movement where it starts –**with the MAGA politicians that fuel the hate and fervor of these movements.**

[**Our best chance to fight back against the extreme MAGA agenda is at the ballot box. I’ll be honest, in this single-digit race, and with our fundraising lagging perilously behind, my seat is a top target. clean_body: | = = = A young Raul Ruiz in Kindergarten, reciting the pledge of allegiance. Folks, when I was a kid, I loved to read. I would read anything I could get my hands on. Adventure books, comic books, cereal boxes, you name it. As I grew up, I read books that broadened my view of the world, challenged my ideas, and forced me to grow as a person. I am, in part, the person I am today because of the experiences I gained while reading. I’m more empathetic, more understanding, and more willing to hear someone else’s point of view. Which is why it terrifies me to see extreme MAGA Republicans all across the country (even in California!) pushing to ban books with just a passing mention of complicated topics or ideas that MAGA extremists find taboo. Put plainly, team – these MAGA book bans are blatant attacks, not only on the free expression of authors and school children, but adults and society more broadly. I’m fighting tooth-and-nail against ever increasing MAGA book bans, but we need to snuff out this bigoted movement where it starts –with the MAGA politicians that fuel the hate and fervor of these movements. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Dr. Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: We’re grateful for your support
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Email%20Header%20-%20Thank%20You%20%281%29.png]
Hi Peter,
During this season of gratitude, all of us at OLCV want to thank you for everything you do all year long to help protect the Oregon we love. We’ve had some important wins this year for Oregon’s people, climate, and environment, and none of it would be possible without you.
This year’s session was one of the most challenging in recent years, but you helped us get strong pro-climate and pro-environment bills over the finish line–and helped us stop bad bills and rollbacks to climate protections and our land use system. You also advocated for a climate-smart Farm Bill and protections for Oregon’s majestic Owyhee Canyonlands. You’ve sent emails to legislators, provided public testimony on bills, met with elected officials, and attended town halls, rallies, and other events. Your tireless activism inspires us every day.
Our work–protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-climate and pro-environment candidates, and holding our elected leaders accountable–is always challenging, but it’s easier knowing that we are in it together. Thousands of OLCV supporters including you give us the strength and power we need to continue protecting the Oregon we love.
Thanks for being part of our community.
With sincere gratitude,
Lindsey and the rest of the OLCV team–Morgan, April, Julia, Sam, Charlotte, Gordon, and Britney
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Staff%20Photo%20collage.png]
Connect With Us:Facebook [http://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv/] Contact Info:Oregon League of Conservation Voters
321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600
Portland, OR 97204
United States
Instagram [http://www.instagram.com/olcv/]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/OLCV]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=C39REkyhs6xWxv8KkbWQg%2B5%2FXE4Zpg6JGttOsXq4OzGYJFTI%2BNEWa9J4D9usQ4ESxnNATb2I686VNXyUm8p770iaKcZiy2qA915Dk8iSqywjALguaMBNc3kB5r39AsGyah5p2BtUNfEmF8B55pBxrtfUqtEJF30cDf%2F1UXoR%2BAiMGUTc3yH9HOhPnz6PDOi0S8Ov2%2F604fx5p25K%2BTeoNyXPSGfQMxyX%2Bpt0E%2FaVPnURr049hn4599cIoSffi0OBjBi8j5GQkBrI2VozDXkHi2g34jruyYbH%2BI1B1QaOJttjVJbkD%2BYB7SoIy9lSxj1UOwP3xqUTLD%2F3ZNopKOreqIliN7HY0xa%2FnCcF%2BQuK904ke1MuRadatHb7JZRcbCoIpuuvdAzyMGI%2Fq0ZiMOizqsia1Pup0o4UEuqA63fTyhE%3D .

Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: **.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, your response is vital!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | |
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

Peter,
Since DAY 1, Congressman Lawler has made it clear where he stands.
**He has stood by the people of Israel.**
But not everyone feels the same way.
Socialists like AOC, and her allies Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib have made their point clear: they stand with Hamas.
How about far-left, radical Mondaire Jones? He voted with “the Squad” almost 100% of the time!
These anti-Semites in Congress don’t think we should fund our ally Israel, chanted hateful sayings, made false claims, and some have even posted vile tweets.

clean_body: | | | | We need to know | Peter, Since DAY 1, Congressman Lawler has made it clear where he stands. He has stood by the people of Israel. But not everyone feels the same way. Socialists like AOC, and her allies Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib have made their point clear: they stand with Hamas. How about far-left, radical Mondaire Jones? He voted with “the Squad” almost 100% of the time! These anti-Semites in Congress don’t think we should fund our ally Israel, chanted hateful sayings, made false claims, and some have even posted vile tweets. That is why we want to know where you stand, Peter. | | Thank you for sharing your thoughts. Team Lawler | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Run for Local Office!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xghrik-didthutlhu-m/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,
### As we approach the end of the year, we are reaching out with a special invitation to forge real change in your community. We believe in the power of local communities and the impact that dedicated conservatives have on shaping the future of Wisconsin. That's why we're asking **YOU** to consider running for local office in your community!
[I'M INTERESTED](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-y/)
### Change starts at the local level, and we need passionate patriots like you to step up and make a difference. Whether you have a background in public service or are a concerned citizen ready to contribute, running for local office is an excellent way to be directly involved in shaping the policies and decisions that impact your neighborhood, town, or city.
[MAKE AN IMPACT](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-j/)
### If you're ready to take the first step towards making a difference, now is the time to act. Nomination paper circulation for local offices begins on December 1st. This is your opportunity to gather the signatures needed to officially enter the race and make your mark on your community.
[MARK YOUR MARK](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-t/)
### Don't let this chance pass you by - your voice matters, and we believe in your ability to lead. Visit [this link](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-i/) for resources on running for office, including guidelines on circulating nomination papers and where to find the nearest training!
[I'M READY TO RUN](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-d/)
### Thank you for considering this important opportunity to be a positive force for change in your community. Together, we can build a stronger, more prosperous future for Wisconsin.
### In Freedom,
### Team WisGOP
[RUN FOR OFFICE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-h/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-k/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-u/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-p/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xghrik-didthutlhu-x/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.WISGOP.ORG | Republican Party of Wisconsin148 E. Johnson StreetMadison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-xghrik-931243C5-didthutlhu-c) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xghrik-didthutlhu-q/)

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae6ebf1c8bd447cfa717879a592db778&_e=PuZsm3mEFkkyUA3rF2dMRmBwvyMweJrmSRyiC_qjeUmoGd8asMKRQdpPsRPT3qaHTuPKlwXsrPJ1FWy3s8X5TWfimWV8JnXACWqSbNAryLE716G_QuIJCypV28vv-zW16X4SkiBvu3Sur6sKZez7H92jXlTHZ22z6gpHyZYbLWW5IBQW0h2LfhPUod2TsA03czH9nwC9rvG9SqJXbO6q4NneXrD01JN0c0upj7QnSJxZr6AzPBKlM6xnp35y_fJnUYzvZmqH51Gm_49n7j7nOpSqZ7MtczcH0F9odkqQuUoVgLzK1cavM4QUPJAO3hxY_qWvld07mEitcR9dbndqlen23wIzMSOtETqwlRpNPwWCYyjPL3evRwCB23oHJklO)

clean_body: It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. | | Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet. It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. I know our country is in desperate need of prayer. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? But this is a critical time for us as several highly extreme Republican candidates have jumped into the race against me.

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c1d9a72ebee14e4b907c6aefb4905fca&_e=X2m7kjtoSjRm22fjDaHGVQRXhcPSv30T4tbteoTy9hiPlC83yHDFzQsZqU9YR-G7zHGc5QN7gQcBs9qSdo4Jt88jXlTq4yu24sWUnQSZi0nIKoFI5DIpxKOQGtS-1nyqsROj86hw9tugD7aAWFenXzknECH3kNaQmXnV38_LpazqeRqDzL4p8yhGtSt19B06al64A76ohDQ1q3Yd9fAC44v8cpD5zXADKWeJCf3D8ZWyCp9_PkatUOner9iM_aMHR1rIc493mRU4qLbL5Kupi4OsKB7ehnC5lf-KhpyP2cUVWyUuI7WNvj3IiYVVvpXHobZP1LUsD-A6q_sw5frIjjlSexQRFIs5NYgQFHllFaylLao7YT8-AZml44v-ONJJ)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Stand Against Antisemitism
body:
Peter, Recently, I have taken a decisive stand against antisemitism by introducing a resolution to condemn the slogan "from the river to the sea, Palestine will be free" as inherently antisemitic.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-r/) Peter, Recently, I have taken a decisive stand against antisemitism by introducing a resolution to condemn the slogan "from the river to the sea, Palestine will be free" as inherently antisemitic. This phrase is a dangerous call for the destruction of Israel and its Jewish population. [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-y/) [HELP ANTHONY WIN ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-j/) The urgency of this resolution is underscored by the recent actions of Rep. Rashida Tlaib, who used this slogan on social media. Such rhetoric is not only offensive but also threatens the security of Israel, America's key ally. As the representative of the Fourth Congressional District, I refuse to stand by as members of Congress promote messages that endanger Jewish lives and undermine our national interests. [](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-i/) [Listen to Anthony on Berman and Riedel](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-d/) To effectively combat these dangerous narratives and promote our values, we need your help. Your donation will empower us to challenge antisemitism head-on and uphold the strong relationship between the U.S. and Israel.**[Chip in today and help us win in November!](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-h/)** [CHIP IN $25 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-k/) [CHIP IN $50 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-u/) [CHIP IN $100 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-o/) [CHIP IN $250 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-b/) [ANY AMOUNT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-n/) Sincerely,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-ptddjll-dytjdljkkt-p/)
---

Peter, Recently, I have taken a decisive stand against antisemitism by introducing a resolution to condemn the slogan "from the river to the sea, Palestine will be free" as inherently antisemitic. This phrase is a dangerous call for the destruction of Israel and its Jewish population. The urgency of this resolution is underscored by the recent actions of Rep. Rashida Tlaib, who used this slogan on social media. Such rhetoric is not only offensive but also threatens the security of Israel, America's key ally. As the representative of the Fourth Congressional District, I refuse to stand by as members of Congress promote messages that endanger Jewish lives and undermine our national interests. To effectively combat these dangerous narratives and promote our values, we need your help. Your donation will empower us to challenge antisemitism head-on and uphold the strong relationship between the U.S. and Israel. Sincerely, Anthony | |

** Happy Thanksgiving!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Celebrating our survival, endurance, and exceptionalism that leads to abundance!
------------------------------------------------------------

Hi Patriots,

Happy Thanksgiving, a holiday that commemorates the pilgrims’ survival, the endurance of the American spirit, and our exceptionalism that has brought so much abundance and success! There is much to be grateful for and I wish you all of it!

Enjoy, be well, and never give up!

Thank you for your support and time!

Bonnie (https://wallaceforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a30b2c82c43821565573ac68b&id=f5d9be659b&e=b2fb6a3035)

I am always looking for opportunities to share my story of how I took the plunge into politics and why I am running for Congress now. If you have any ideas or tips, please let me know. Here are some upcoming events where I’ll be speaking:

Monday, November 27 - South Pasadena

Greater Pasadena Republican Assembly meeting,

Potluck Meeting 4:30 pm

CRA Meeting, 7:00 pm

Saturday, December 16 - Monrovia

Save the Date!

Sunday, January 28 - Monrovia

Save the Date!

Let me know if you’re interested in attending any of these. More to come!

Please follow the campaign on Facebook and Instagram and if you want to get involved email (mailto:bonnie@wallaceforcongress.us?subject=I%20want%20to%20help!&body=) or text me (tel:16266444845) .

Last meeting of the year!

Monday, November 27, 7:00 PM, Griffins of Kinsale

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Rediscovering the Nativity
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
____Hello Friend,

As the Christmas season approaches, it’s easy to get caught up in the whirlwind of festivities, decorations, and traditions. It’s the time of year when nativity scenes adorn our homes, and the Christmas story echoes in our ears once more. But, let’s be honest, sometimes our familiarity with these things can dim the awe of that very first Christmas.

As we grow older, the nativity scenes around town and the Christmas story we hear each year may lose some of their enchantment. They become an annual ritual, and the words of the story become more like a well-rehearsed script than an immersive experience. It’s not uncommon to find ourselves hearing or reciting those familiar passages without truly pausing to absorb their profound significance.

This year, I invite you to approach the Christmas season with fresh eyes and an open heart. Imagine that you are seeing the nativity scene for the first time, that you’re peering into the lives of the characters with a renewed perspective. Let’s recapture the wonder that may have faded over the years.
---
| | _Pathway to Victory_ has created a beautifully designed book featuring intricate illustrations of the nativity figures, bringing the story to life. Called simply _The Nativity Devotional_ , in its pages, you’ll discover devotions that delve into the lives of the central characters: Mary, Joseph, the shepherds, the wise men, the angels, and, of course, Baby Jesus.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-SyTId1y46w1GfhoNI1A)
---
| | What can we learn from these individuals, each uniquely chosen by God to play a vital role in that momentous occasion? _The Nativity Devotional _will be your guide to rediscovering the wonder of Christmas.

As our gift to you in return for your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ , this devotional is perfect for sharing as a family. You can explore it together while decorating your home for the holidays or in the days leading up to Christmas. And if you have young children or grandchildren, you can use the simple, child-friendly version included at the end of each devotional to share the story with your loved ones.

Secure your copy here: [https://ptv.org/the-nativity-devotional](http://trk.secureandprosper.-pqyMK0nw)

May this coming Christmas season be one of renewed joy, awe, and reverence for you and your family, inspiring you to worship the Savior throughout the entire season.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzI3LWIxNDc1ZWQyM2QzNTQ3ZTg5Y2RmOTE2YmJlYmJmMTY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/rFqJnFScO3HYeq9W9rUCMA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress ](http://links
body:
Finstad for Congress

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDkxMDQxMzIS1&r=MTYwNTE2ODc0MDk4OQS2&j=MjU4MTk5OTk5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

| | Friend – As we gather with family and friends to celebrate this season of gratitude, I want you to know that your belief in our cause has been a great inspiration. Looking ahead, I am excited about the possibilities that the future holds. With your continued support, we will press on, fighting for the principles that make America great. Our journey is far from over, and I am honored to have you by my side. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with joy and the company of those who matter most. With gratitude,

Brad Finstad

name: Wish President Trump a Happy Thanksgiving [via NRSC]
subject: This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Write him a short note to read >>

Friend,

President Trump ALWAYS fought for the American people when he was in office. _The least we can do is tell him, "THANK YOU!"_

Nothing would be more epic this Thanksgiving than **[sending President Trump a card signed by MILLIONS of MAGA supporters all across the country.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zntqqtbiuo2isfmb0u1i8572l17ptke67hh5ehc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6cor5clh2bs) **Well, that's EXACTLY what we're doing, Friend.

**[Sign President Trump's card RIGHT NOW to wish him a HAPPY THANKSGIVING!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpct6a39313lgn688soge9eq6pivh106sp9hklk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6cor5clh2bs)**

**[So what are you waiting for?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqarqs711o39bm2n2opcd961oljitd96jo363a4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6cor5clh2bs)**

#### [**How ranked choice voting upended the Boulder mayor's race**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655ee9491728d14ec0573f8c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.axios.com%2Flocal%2Fdenver%2F2023%2F11%2F09%2Fboulder-mayor-race-ranked-choice-voting-election&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_655ee47ca50d471bbbbf9aa8&l=en-US&s=hGCuVqoxLZx50LSMi93sxyd4d3M%3D)
---
In the recent Boulder city election, Bob Yates, a former Republican who became unaffiliated in May 2022, initially led in the mayoral race. However, the introduction of ranked choice voting shifted the results. Incumbent Mayor Aaron Brockett, a liberal Democrat, overtook Yates with a lead of 497 votes and is expected to win. This shift is attributed to the second-choice votes from Nicole Speer's supporters, who finished third. Speer was endorsed by the local Democratic Socialists of America chapter. This election demonstrated the significant impact of ranked choice voting, which pushed Boulder's municipal politics further to the left. Yates, known for his limits on development and growth, had previously won more votes in the 2015 and 2019 council elections than Brockett. Brockett acknowledged that ranked choice voting was a key factor in his likely victory, differentiating it from a plurality winner system.
---
#### **RCV Overview**
Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) leads to confusion, disenfranchisement, and unfairly benefits left-wing candidates. It uses examples from various elections in the U.S. to argue against RCV.RCV as a Means to Left-Wing Power\- Instances where RCV affected election outcomes are highlighted, such as in Boulder, Colorado, where it helped a center-left candidate win.\- RCV is accused of leading to chaos, as seen in New York City’s 2021 election.RCV's Implementation Issues\- Errors and confusion in RCV implementation are cited, with examples like the Oakland School Board and Alameda County elections.\- Utah’s pilot program is mentioned as an example of RCV not delivering promised benefits.Reports and Studies on RCV\- A University of Minnesota report is referenced, claiming RCV fails to meet its proponents' promises.\- The report notes no significant change in voter turnout or diversity in elected officials with RCV.Voter Confusion and Disenfranchisement\- Examples from Oakland and Arlington, Virginia illustrate voter confusion and potential disenfranchisement.\- Low voter turnout, particularly among minority groups, is highlighted in Alaska’s 2022 general election.Opposition to RCV\- The D.C. Democrat party's rejection of RCV over concerns of disenfranchising minority voters is mentioned.\- Legal challenges to RCV are noted, arguing that it violates constitutional rights.Transparency and Majority Issues\- RCV is criticized for reducing transparency and complicating recounts.\- The concept of “ballot exhaustion” can prevent a true majority win.Specific Election Cases\- The role of RCV in Alaska and Maine elections is discussed, with emphasis on how it can alter expected outcomes.\- Cases where RCV led to unexpected winners are highlighted, questioning its effectiveness in reflecting majority preference. Overall, the text argues that RCV complicates the voting process, undermines traditional majority rule, and often benefits specific political groups at the expense of voter clarity and fairness.
---

### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=655ee9491728d14ec0573f8c&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_655ee47ca50d471bbbbf9aa8&l=en-US&s=xazY0xWPXUMlupfai3cNZJyOHx4%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36966%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NNgmF5qIQ1HRN3i3QD7c4g&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36967%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SXpuAPaLYG1G1oBLNDwvYA&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36968%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=op09cvVT7Phoq0YjybQJig&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36969%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ouc5nUwR4i0PQdqeWYDQTQ&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zat17hhtng40a346hj8cq7vlg73gj2328f71bbj8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj4cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj9afj70dpioahnl8sgqjaqnh4jdo1b6m4hv8c38_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj4cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zff0lroletg5khlmddh1m1vpq1m57iruhhdp4hio_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj4cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgbq6su0tnone7on4p4l7nec5oemhu68jc7o4kko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj4cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

---

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkqnkmlqjtjuubr0s01nk8ak005k4nhmbn6ndii0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj1chh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z889a400bc5khnkru86grb52qkm6dkpoogolhfp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj1chh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhm5g2a7hpftquhr07voqd9cetadbe694fv8g378_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj1chh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgtogaj3akqgshjv853oo51av72ok3s70pqhfg50_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj1chh2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9uckgf7behad1j844ep97h4ujnlb0dlcui5ejho_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj2chh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztaldo2u3f1efvcba6gts2f3pe9b3e0nkvpmq3r8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj2chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk6svp91m1ar5jpttnc4vqjgoqeauttt940bp778_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj2chh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674336%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wH0i%2foZQ%2bO6urkwuKaIGCg&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674337%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pjuB8YqIHShWzyA7MXneeg&sysid=1) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674338%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mqDdzB5c87oChcOSXweVyg&sysid=1)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

clean_body: Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. I would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg13unnjl34doa2nqfksr3urp9emal8o4gd17q08_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj6c5h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgtq5s17mfj8bq6f7apnah5t1rtqi315bn14burg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj6c5h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgm2l882tj367r16b128nbgdlo4gh489of1bpsdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj6c5h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhq305oq43eqbn86hhul4uuros8n94pnmdcvit6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctj6eoj6c5h2bs)

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq5mbocv1hf6jccmgbuq9k72fvhojji5vtknoeho_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctgm0o70cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqsqtl99a7s596lt4ec9m0oh76m3rh0mfarkqm90_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctgm0o70cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgve1p47s3c01q87v3t422ndlsjunhhmce3hjbu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctgm0o70cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi626o4435prrnigpmarn9t890v0ke5rj2q6sc70_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctgm0o70cdh2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh5qhk69vesco20jc40bi7ljmudi842m9ks9uc50_rp22sh2s8i6eo30ctgm2ob5c1h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Today is more than just turkey and football -- it's a chance to be thankful for the freedoms we enjoy as Americans and show gratitude to the important people in our lives. So as we reflect on this Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to reach out to share my appreciation and thanks to YOU for your continued support and dedication in pursuit of preserving our Conservative values. Since announcing my campaign, I’ve had the privilege of spending time with real, hardworking Americans all across Connecticut’s 5th District. I celebrated the city of Southbury’s 350th birthday, taste-tested (a lot) at the 2023 Bethlehem Chilli Tasting, and enjoyed a hilarious evening of comedy at the Lyceum Hall in Terryville. I attended the Madre Latina Organization's Annual Gala in support of their scholarship program and mission to educate and empower generations of Latinas. I knocked on doors in Danbury, New Fairfield, Plainville, Newton, and more. Today, while we recognize the challenges facing our great nation, we also pause and give thanks for many blessings. I am grateful for Connecticut’s 5th District and feel incredibly blessed by the neighbors who have become friends because of this campaign. I look forward to working with you in securing the many victories that lie ahead of us. We give thanks to our troops around the world, law enforcement and first responders, healthcare workers, parents, teachers, and the many everyday hard-working Americans across our Nation. We give thanks for freedom, faith, family, and for living in the greatest country in the world. Again, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving, and may God bless you, your family, and our Nation! Sincerely, https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=2257356ca51e1ee76a88d4babd7e309cb89546d05dffcf8c4b012272cc94a4682288ec4b4faed50acca8ef411b6430a569f456c999bf8679f22b9c4de6618f7b George Logan Paid for George Logan For Congress 26 Catoonah Street Box 72 Ridgefield, CT, 06877 https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=2257356ca51e1ee76ef299c6d9949a6fdbf41d6dd6ebfc39dc30f4e3e444d74c3ccc1b46a7dae70fdcc33d75826539f4edafc0448873b525d1a7f0816939e1f6 Privacy Policy To unsubscribe from GEORGE LOGAN FOR CONGRESS, click here

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
# A Time To Be Grateful
by Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
This time of year prompts us to think of all we are thankful for. I'm grateful for freedom, family, and prosperity.
Freedom, granted by God, our creator, is a gift to us all. The government does not provide freedom. However, it can protect it. I'm grateful for the 30 years I served in the military, protecting freedom around the world. We must be vigilant against the government's encroaching on our freedom. I'm running for Congress to defend freedom by limiting the size and scope of government.
My greatest joy comes from my family. Lesly and I are grateful that each of our four children bought a home in our neighborhood. Our grandchildren can walk to our house. These four (and a half) grandchildren are my world! I'm motivated to run for Congress to make things better for them.
I'm so thankful that I'm an American. We live in the land of opportunity and prosperity - the greatest country in the world. Though we go through ups and downs, we still enjoy blessings of freedom and prosperity rarely experienced in the history of mankind. I will work hard to preserve and grow this prosperity.
Whatever you're grateful for, I hope this Thanksgiving is a special day for you and your family. As for me and my house, we are thankful for freedom, family, and prosperity.
---
