name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/icUf_urss7lWZTK7len-Uw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQbFaP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVVDTi0yMDIzMTEyM1cDc3BjQgplVUsfX2VIBPSDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/icUf_urss7lWZTK7len-Uw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQbFaP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVVDTi0yMDIzMTEyM1cDc3BjQgplVUsfX2VIBPSDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/icUf_urss7lWZTK7len-Uw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQbFaP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVVDTi0yMDIzMTEyM1cDc3BjQgplVUsfX2VIBPSDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/icUf_urss7lWZTK7len-Uw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQbFaP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVVDTi0yMDIzMTEyM1cDc3BjQgplVUsfX2VIBPSDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[Donate](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/icUf_urss7lWZTK7len-Uw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQbFaP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVVDTi0yMDIzMTEyM1cDc3BjQgplVUsfX2VIBPSDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Don't forget what they did
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LTZnyC60qtPuHeWEn6_xzg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQcqMP0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplVbofX2UvWpcFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Fellow American,The radical Left wants you to forget.They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID. They want you to forget that they lied to your face for over a year. They want you to forget that they let extremists riot in the streets while they told you to skip holidays with your loved ones and to “social distance.”They want you to forget how they closed our schools, our businesses, and our houses of worship. (Gavin Newsom even closed Orange County beaches). **And maybe most of all, they want you to forget that thousands of hardworking, competent people either lost their jobs or were forced to take a vaccine they didn’t want.****They want you to forget that...** _...And I hope you never do._ Because if you forget what they did, it’s only a matter of time before they do it again.It’s only a matter of time before they find a new reason to trample your rights and your freedoms for the so-called “greater good.”We can’t forget what the radical Left and its draconian policies did to us and to our families – and we can’t let them forget it either. **That’s why the Center for American Liberty is still putting their feet to the fire and holding them accountable.** But nothing we do is possible without the generosity of patriots like you. **[**Will you give us the funds we need to win this landmark case and make the Left pay for what it did?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LTZnyC60qtPuHeWEn6_xzg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQcqMP0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplVbofX2UvWpcFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** We filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID-19 vaccine.And if we can win this critical lawsuit, we can put employers across the country on notice ahead of what some are calling a COVID resurgence.Dovid was the assistant concertmaster and first violinist, while Chris and Rachel both played the French Horn.They are some of the most talented musicians in the country in highly coveted and competitive positions._Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade._ When the Symphony introduced its vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris and Rachel each hold sincere religious beliefs that prohibit them from taking the COVID vaccine.They all filed for religious exemptions and were willing to take other measures, like regularly testing, to prove they didn’t have COVID.But shortly after submitting their requestions for religious exemptions, the Symphony rejected their requests and put them on UNPAID LEAVE.These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish.**It doesn’t matter who you are or what you believe – the radical Left doesn’t respect your right to practice your faith as you see fit.** In their eyes, your body doesn’t belong to you – it belongs to them.I’m deciding to take a stand – and I hope you will too. **[**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty to fund this lawsuit for religious freedom and set a precedent nationwide that puts these radicals on notice.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LTZnyC60qtPuHeWEn6_xzg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQcqMP0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplVbofX2UvWpcFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Even after lifting its vaccine mandate, the Symphony refused to give these musicians their jobs back.Because it was never about “science” or “health” – it was always about control.I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LTZnyC60qtPuHeWEn6_xzg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQcqMP0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplVbofX2UvWpcFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: A Note of Thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
Happy Thanksgiving!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q-C9Vo8MnNn3Y1PnkWE9y16G31hE6-sjUb_5pgPNXR0qFAEA7wR8zF5ZHs_4Iu4YJ_Y87cPYetVOfu2m_u21ObCWUbcpfkduY7akhdpwUueiTmMMuxkvQViw-7LLVOMSeh7uBk1yFIH-RBHFzOOZW87cS3B9f5Gb&c=9zluADyWL8IvzcRVPKKjs7SX0EzvnvSrHnGO2ATwS5QqzOWCf1VFUg==&ch=D5lFgzJTWT_ulyF1RegBTxF2RGBJgoRyJA8j93k8Ubxkt0_sqPP2KQ==)
---
| Dear Friends,
This Thanksgiving, I want to wish you and your families the blessings of this beautiful season and extend my deepest gratitude for your incredible support of our work together for Georgia.
Now in our third year, many of you have followed Greater Georgia from the start, while others are new to engaging in our year-round work. I am so grateful that you are a part of our efforts - and our mission to grow the state's conservative movement.
Whether registering voters, engaging with diverse communities, or advocating for important issues such as election integrity, education, and public safety, we can always count on you to be there and contribute to the work of building conservative infrastructure for our state.
Our team is grateful for your time, effort, and friendship - and I'm deeply heartened by how many of you share our passion for strengthening the future of Georgia. Thank you for your willingness to join the fight to secure its freedom and prosperity. Your support is the driving force behind our mission to make sure every conservative voice is heard.
At Thanksgiving, I think about the blessings we have, uniquely as Americans - and our responsibility to preserve them for future generations. I look forward to our continued partnership and the positive impact we can have in 2024 and beyond.
Wishing you a wonderful Thanksgiving surrounded by family and friends.
Let us come into his presence with thanksgiving; let us make a joyful noise to him with songs of praise! Psalm 95:2
Warm regards,

---
|
---
| Kelly Loeffler Greater Georgia Chairwoman
---
| |
---

clean_body: Happy Thanksgiving! | | | | == | Dear Friends, This Thanksgiving, I want to wish you and your families the blessings of this beautiful season and extend my deepest gratitude for your incredible support of our work together for Georgia. Now in our third year, many of you have followed Greater Georgia from the start, while others are new to engaging in our year-round work. I am so grateful that you are a part of our efforts - and our mission to grow the state's conservative movement. Whether registering voters, engaging with diverse communities, or advocating for important issues such as election integrity, education, and public safety, we can always count on you to be there and contribute to the work of building conservative infrastructure for our state. Our team is grateful for your time, effort, and friendship - and I'm deeply heartened by how many of you share our passion for strengthening the future of Georgia. Thank you for your willingness to join the fight to secure its freedom and prosperity. Your support is the driving force behind our mission to make sure every conservative voice is heard. At Thanksgiving, I think about the blessings we have, uniquely as Americans - and our responsibility to preserve them for future generations. I look forward to our continued partnership and the positive impact we can have in 2024 and beyond. Wishing you a wonderful Thanksgiving surrounded by family and friends. Let us come into his presence with thanksgiving; let us make a joyful noise to him with songs of praise! Psalm 95:2 Warm regards, | | Kelly Loeffler Greater Georgia Chairwoman | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | == == == | | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988, Atlanta, GA 30355 | | == Sent by mailto:info@greatergeorgia.com

name: Christian Castelli
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
Peter,

The early Pilgrims lost most of what they knew and many whom they loved in their pursuit of liberty and justice for themselves and their posterity. They fled a country that stole from their labor to give to others' leisure. A country that forbade them from their conscience. That sought domination of their every word and thought.

The first Thanksgiving harvest feast in the New World was a testament to God's grace through it all. He sustained them in their loss, healed their sicknesses, worked through indigenous peoples to teach them the ways of this harsh, but bountiful new land. Having seen His providence (through, some would argue, his judgment), they rejoiced at His gracious sovereignty.

We read a gratitude example in 1 Samuel 7:12, when the prophet led the Israelites to memorialize the Lord's providence.

_Then Samuel took a stone and set it up between Mizpah and Shen. He named it Ebenezer, saying, "Thus far the LORD has helped us."_

The place where the Ebenezer was erected was between Mizpah (protection/blessing) and Shen (judgment/3-pronged flesh hook). The Lord sustains us through all.

Today, as in days past, man's own inhumanity to man is once again on the rise. Evil runs rampant and man races to justify it. The "New Molechians" once again lash out in their attempt to overcome civilization with violence and to drag humanity back to caves of fear and poverty.

Yet here, although we struggle more to pay bills than in years past, and though the blessings of America may prove tenuous at this time, we give thanks to the One in whom we live and move and have our being, whatever befalls us. I have [spent my life](https://castellifornc.com/about/) fighting for the values I learned in church pews, knowing it was God Who brought me through each batlle.

Thanksgiving 2023 represents an opportunity for us to exhibit defiant gratitude to the Lord Who sustains us in all things.

"Thus far, the Lord has helped us."

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=41d3e478-755c-4d23-8433-595bd58a64ca).

name: Coach
subject: There is no greater joy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
| | | Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

I’m glad to reach you. I wanted to drop a quick note to wish you and your loved ones all the best as we celebrate this special holiday and reflect on all we have to be thankful for.

_There’s no greater joy than spending quality time catching up with family and friends, watching some football, and enjoying a great Thanksgiving meal!_
---
---
We have so many blessings in life that can be easy to take for granted. I’m so thankful for my amazing family and friends, for good health, and to have so many great supporters like you standing behind me as I take a stand for what’s right and just in Washington. **I appreciate having you on the team more than words can express. **
** **
Again, Happy Thanksgiving to you and your loved ones, Peter!

\- Coach

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We’re thankful for you, Friend
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Read more about how your support makes an impact!** | [READ MORE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2140676?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
As a dedicated member of Friends of the Earth, your support has allowed us to fight for the future of our planet and the vulnerable species that inhabit it. Today, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your contribution to saving our one and only Earth and all the life it supports. [_**See your impact.**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2140677?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
None of our work would be possible without you. Your donations empower us to hire campaigners, conduct groundbreaking research, and lobby for real, positive change in communities across the country. And your advocacy amplifies countless voices while pressuring companies and politicians to save bees from toxic pesticides, stop dangerous pipelines, and put the planet before profits.
**See more about your planet-saving impact!**
[READ MORE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2140678?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
In 2013, following the alarming collapse in bee populations, we launched our Bee Action campaign to save bees from toxic pesticides like neonics. Neonics are the most widely used class of insecticides in the world, used on more than 140 crops from apples and almonds to rice and soybeans.
Neonics are also key culprits in massive pollinator declines. They can kill bees on contact. And they’ve made U.S. agriculture nearly 50 times more toxic to bees and other pollinators in the last few decades. Now, we are seeing many wild bee species spiral toward extinction, like the American bumblebee.
Neonics don’t just hurt pollinators. They harm people, too -- including the farmworkers and rural communities on the frontlines of exposure. These chemicals also threaten the soil life -- from earthworms to microbes -- that is the heart of regenerative agriculture. As long as neonic usage continues, we can’t foster healthy soils that sequester more carbon, enhance farmers’ resilience to climate change, and conserve water.
That’s why Friends of the Earth is working with the largest grocery retailers to create pollinator protection policies for their supply chains. Thanks to this work and pressure from activists like you, we successfully moved 12 of the largest 25 food retailers in the U.S. -- including Walmart and Costco -- to address the toxic pesticides in their supply chains.
Supporters like you have played a vital role in these efforts to make our planet and agriculture more bee-friendly. In this cartoon, you can read in detail about the work you’ve made possible and how your relentless advocacy pressures corporate giants to do the right thing for bees.
**Find out how your action has made a difference for bees, people, and our food system.**
[READ MORE](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2140679?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Fighting to save our planet is hard work. But your support inspires us every day, and we won’t give up until bee-killing pesticides are gone for good.
**We could not do this work without you.** Thank you for showing up with us, persisting after every setback, and celebrating every victory. We are so proud to work with you to make the world a better place for bees.
**Gratefully,
Lisa Archer
Food and agriculture program director,
Friends of the Earth Action **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Fus.e-activist.com%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D272593&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Explosion at the Canadian Border, Super Pigs Head South, and Thanksgiving in Space
body:
A car exploded at a bridge connecting the western New York and Canada, killing two people inside the vehicle.

# THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 23, 2023
---|---
**Happy Thanksgiving!** In 1863, in the midst of the Civil War, President Abraham Lincoln proclaimed that the last Thursday in November would be set aside as a day of Thanksgiving. President Ulysses Grant made it an official federal holiday in 1879. ([See Lincoln's Proclamation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS0IDmLMwNDFW7p2tDA-wrUYLBvF6ttXqjp2_Zdf38djfgQqVJ_vYUPfU5tD7PTCWakb6Bvo2fDVJ0RAzdErK6U1o1KWZw9oo1RGuwWVSUY7g8swrnG8O4A1DZw8SNBKgVby7sCJkBa8L2i1k8qMQ2JG4kq9HeKzUe0ZU_luLzxEbBsvPve-n0y_MZgYTNd1ibAcIYetUI2t1FYLVRTteDKY_hqD6dwRY8aTwdRzqF-nyH3jh1_3i0qhc7DMyOcWqPx--v_snwAAAP__TS9aYQ))

## Vehicle Explodes at Canadian Border Crossing
A car exploded at a bridge connecting western New York and Canada, killing two people inside the vehicle. The [explosion was strong enough](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQQNGvgY4VDNiYguI17va1KS3AwzIRNiubrJO_j5I69S2udN7uyz1Qpf3xP2zoe25LSJ1euCglQAvQi-Grz4iAmqNXVkprJqUsL14O1kFOIUub4pBVUqs1cRiVc1OaXOTkQYJWCrSSgwN3CzniENFqJ5WZxsyMxJV6O27vjfZeMNev9sLjltrGqy-9P0-m_zGYGcy9YKFafxqDubQNd7xOBvPZQ0dxhZ4Kg9lo0GZU4gi0x3aJeND6QPFxihT2sAaBn8_aTmo7g5kffn1eVCudo2VGPrZAvwfe_8b4DgAA___3IGCS) to make observers believe it was an act of terrorism, but Governor Kathy Hochul says there's no evidence of that. In security footage, the [car can be seen](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFr8zAQgOFfI20xujvJkgYN31fwltKto1Hkc6wix8G-JvTfF9q18wsvPO_n8Zxrq7fra145ybyNuUh98AhwQjohjVZPaWZGJs0JvDHeBgCvl-QKYp6KNaH0YMgHa4NBR1QoE1ina0KDBIAExkWMXZ4v7C7sKRqwoZ-VNTxV2fbuY6s3WXhuX9uD965sq25pEbkfiv4pHBQO8qwiv03h8PL_TeFwSJbPQ-EAHr11JsQICCF6H3u9p-n-rK3Vo_fKmuuaa_s5y9_Q7wAAAP__mhpP5w) driving extremely fast before hitting an object and launching into the air. "_This vehicle basically incinerated_ ," the Governor said. "_Nothing is left but the engine_." A Customs and Border Protection officer went to the hospital with minor injuries, and all four bridges in the Niagra Falls area were closed.
## "Super Pigs" Threaten Invasion
"Super pigs" are thriving in southern Canada, and the states of Minnesota, North Dakota, and Montana are doing their best to prevent an incursion of what one ecologist called "[the most invasive species on earth](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vwyAUAH-NvRHx-IwHhi7Z0rWjxccjeRUGC6NY_fdVOnc83XK6r_t691SoPj79hm7ktvo46IUrABOSCbmqObmMKFDO6MBybtUVwM5PB0HpvMRok0pKIlirr4JLr5KyErKZyQkuJICQwPUilovPAXVAKxcO6mrypDgmGq1fvhvV8cRcftoL-yW2bS7uOcZ-TPJjErdJ3Pxe8Tze6g19UCw4idtJJbGdHgfL2H1hx0kVWfTVJ882qhWPNjwLrSfsDPXitRKYg4xGJZ1VAGlyBGmDNUbP3aX9pFLoMHZS_LF5Kn854_87vwEAAP__RjFlHQ)." In the 1980s, the Canadian government encouraged farmers to raise wild boars. When the market for the animals collapsed, many boars were released into the wild, where they proceeded to survive Canadian winters, breed with domestic swine, and [create a crossbreed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFurDAQQNGvMZ2RPTawFC5eQ7evTYkGGMNExiDsxcnfR0na9Fc60n17jk_kwHH9jzu57I8R58w3jVpLMBLMaKvFeSIgU5HTnVKdfWjdVZvr5kabnvrWa2ibuWm8tWhwgUdrp6m1FTtQYLQGo1XTQ1-jn6iZqDO90vbRemEVLZyPq34_OOaNfPg8brrq-dir4LaczyTMPwGDgKGUUhdMG8c1H5E-cOf4mwoYIpUkYJgx4sIYZXqddMmT1yTzdhFmipLjjQvJb6BsFHb5StXllrNwCJzaTli17sjhR89_z_gKAAD__6FHYxI) that's tearing up farmland and spreading diseases. Minnesota is monitoring the border with drones to watch for invading pigs, and aggressive solutions are being suggested to remove any of the animals that enter the US: nets fired from helicopters, huge ground traps called BoarBusters, and poison.
## Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
The annual parade in NYC is kicking off a half-hour earlier today, at 8:30 AM (ET). [This year's edition](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj72O8yAQAJ8GuljsLv4rKL6GLl97pbU2S8wJB8tGsfL2p1x97Yw00nzdpzunnJ6P_7yJq7FMvNT0kgnghnRDmqwOLoqgkBYHvTG9HQB6vToDODMJWTJdyyCBAHCYQ6CRg7Ssk0ODH0hg2hHHhuMs7Sw9jQbs0EVljYRUy9F8l_Ssq8T8Li85mqVsOru11v1U9E-hV-iv62o2Xt7nxyr0p0K_88FBFHp9uLBfKed0dr2y5rFxyr-Z-vfVTwAAAP__8C1NCw) will feature 16 giant balloons, 26 total floats, 12 marching bands, and hundreds of clowns. Cher will perform toward the end of the ceremony, along with a host of other musical acts. You can [watch the parade](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskUHLnDAQhn9NvEWSiW704GFpkUL5eiiFHpfRjJquJkucbuqlv72se-3pfQceHoaZnx-3D_SrD_M33KjjKd5wZP-km9YSjARzqwrXTURApqBOW6Vs1Whti6WrGgfGatS1HprR1mAbg0YpZ00Fw9AWvgMFRmswWtUttCVOA9UDWdMqXTWXSVSKnOeYyl_RB15oWo_4pFSOcSvWbmF-7MJcBfQC-pxzGYYxUD5iur8QAT0FpsTow0aBBfRLXL3DYxfQbzgeu-QFw32f_dOHWTo85AMTOpJ5QZYc5T3ELP0kj_g7kZzjC-MoM_K4SB_kg9Ieg4C-amwLF33uYoS5_hXmyvSHhfn8YyEBNai3-qzZr-tZ0KczV_8kAZ--RIfn_DXy8AaCO_P65r_HO6WySJ17vBx-v1hRqXlDv55X4f8_6V8AAAD___QUj-U) on your local NBC station or stream it on the Peacock app.

**➤ Scientists **are working on a new hydrogel for type 2 diabetes patients that only needs to be injected once every four months, rather than daily as current treatments require. clean_body: A car exploded at a bridge connecting the western New York and Canada, killing two people inside the vehicle. | | | | | | THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 23, 2023 ---|--- Happy Thanksgiving! In 1863, in the midst of the Civil War, President Abraham Lincoln proclaimed that the last Thursday in November would be set aside as a day of Thanksgiving. President Ulysses Grant made it an official federal holiday in 1879. () Haven't signed up for The Flyover yet? You can take care of that . Want to keep up with us on Facebook? . | Vehicle Explodes at Canadian Border Crossing A car exploded at a bridge connecting western New York and Canada, killing two people inside the vehicle. The to make observers believe it was an act of terrorism, but Governor Kathy Hochul says there's no evidence of that. In security footage, the driving extremely fast before hitting an object and launching into the air. "This vehicle basically incinerated ," the Governor said. "Nothing is left but the engine." A Customs and Border Protection officer went to the hospital with minor injuries, and all four bridges in the Niagra Falls area were closed. "Super Pigs" Threaten Invasion "Super pigs" are thriving in southern Canada, and the states of Minnesota, North Dakota, and Montana are doing their best to prevent an incursion of what one ecologist called "." In the 1980s, the Canadian government encouraged farmers to raise wild boars. When the market for the animals collapsed, many boars were released into the wild, where they proceeded to survive Canadian winters, breed with domestic swine, and that's tearing up farmland and spreading diseases. Minnesota is monitoring the border with drones to watch for invading pigs, and aggressive solutions are being suggested to remove any of the animals that enter the US: nets fired from helicopters, huge ground traps called BoarBusters, and poison. Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade The annual parade in NYC is kicking off a half-hour earlier today, at 8:30 AM (ET). will feature 16 giant balloons, 26 total floats, 12 marching bands, and hundreds of clowns. Cher will perform toward the end of the ceremony, along with a host of other musical acts. You can on your local NBC station or stream it on the Peacock app. Enjoy reading The Flyover? mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. | ➤ The head of pro-Desantis PAC Never Back Down, Chris Jankowski , is stepping down from his position. The resignation comes amidst rumors of discord between the PAC and the DeSantis campaign. () ➤ A judge in Oregon ruled that recently passed gun control legislation violated the state's constitution. Measure 114, which passed by a slim margin, requires gun purchasers to obtain a police-issued five year permit and pass a background check. () ➤**Thirty Members of the House have announced they will not seek re-election. Some are seeking higher office, others are taking private sector opportunities, and some say they're tired of the gridlock. () | Flying together with: Hello Flyover Reader! Today is set aside for feasting, family, and thankfulness. We've got plenty to be grateful for here at The Flyover --starting with you. We mean it; without our loyal family of readers, we'd have to taxi into an empty hangar somewhere and leave The Flyover to rust. Thankfully, we're taking off six days per week with 470,000 of you. Honestly, this has grown even faster than we thought it would, and we count it as an honor to have each of you as a passenger on our journey. We don't charge any airfare for The Flyover , and we never will. Our goal is to deliver a quality news product to as many people as possible. We rely on the kindness and generosity of our readers, and you have blown us away with your support! If you can count The Flyover as something to be thankful for this year, would you drop us a tip? Special shoutout to Gerald from Virginia and LeAnn from Colorado for your recent contributions. Thank you for your support! \- Cole, CEO | ➤ Three NFL games kick off today, starting with the Lions vs. the Packers at 12:30 ET. The Commanders will try to stop their losing slide vs. the Cowboys at 4:30, and the nightcap is an NFC West showdown between the 49ers and Seahawks at 8:20. () **➤ In college hoops, #2 Purdue defeated #4 Marquette to win the prestigious Maui Invitational Tournament. 7'4 center Zach Edey led Purdue with 28 points and 15 rebounds. () **➤Football and Thanksgiving have been intertwined for 150 years, ever since the first Thanksgiving college championship game in 1876 between Yale and Harvard. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9417b85618e944ae96674cfafde317a9&_e=sLdUfTwUITwWz_HT-EgM3tIBoXzo8zszCrh08YvZhVqiny3kzmEnMb-RvMSkBq0-rFw5DQqCCCKczr59ytE-dVcYotzy4ke4jaof34S_-4RySi5KbB3mL9aJlzME9uybjLk7xIdDWtrlH1I72qz3Rk9o_hfrEXuQ3YcecH4IkNb662xmjoBiZwI9VQnmuVrEzzTC78Hy4wZ5L_p1PugHzZr4v1wRKP8Gf2lVbLi4mGU01TVciCbSBA3mcZea_baFzLLMJK2AkIOlLZRIH7KAiBNz-vZnJViajOG62FGP2WD3RqWfkIMt1q5LfmsvSGKkVXDqOFKL3ho9iUNfDLefSMB9IzXFiIjbENVlU-DlNF_ai73QTd6X7aKMps0v5FQiCf0ZN3HHTaipSsxHctWXoN0sMGR0eD7JFZf_pZ9U4h0%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9417b85618e944ae96674cfafde317a9&_e=sLdUfTwUITwWz_HT-EgM3tIBoXzo8zszCrh08YvZhVqiny3kzmEnMb-RvMSkBq0-rFw5DQqCCCKczr59ytE-dVcYotzy4ke4jaof34S_-4RySi5KbB3mL9aJlzME9uybjLk7xIdDWtrlH1I72qz3Rk9o_hfrEXuQ3YcecH4IkNb662xmjoBiZwI9VQnmuVrEzzTC78Hy4wZ5L_p1PugHzZr4v1wRKP8Gf2lVbLi4mGU01TVciCbSBA3mcZea_baFzLLMJK2AkIOlLZRIH7KAiBDtdcC3NCi7OFiJsES3ztwdFaR9zaaP7Rm13rxYcgIksaM51NmnBqAhHVOX93-1ySSHnNWnNnWXcBrA0-hBUzEy4L12PnKS784ymWB-ZP_54LZmgB6BsFP1aAqbdz_VvrIH8iaSm0OCJHs2AbZPwZo%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9417b85618e944ae96674cfafde317a9&_e=sLdUfTwUITwWz_HT-EgM3tIBoXzo8zszCrh08YvZhVqiny3kzmEnMb-RvMSkBq0-rFw5DQqCCCKczr59ytE-dVcYotzy4ke4jaof34S_-4RySi5KbB3mL9aJlzME9uybjLk7xIdDWtrlH1I72qz3Rk9o_hfrEXuQ3YcecH4IkNb662xmjoBiZwI9VQnmuVrEzzTC78Hy4wZ5L_p1PugHzZr4v1wRKP8Gf2lVbLi4mGU01TVciCbSBA3mcZea_baFzLLMJK2AkIOlLZRIH7KAiJDiph8R4YsGJt_hs0ybhJKiMhFcDWbPYwHVRCOWhWt0n2a2mo3YDtrNjS6JHl-WqSaaZiJAsf2hXGG9I0SyTzf_9YXAeGBRZIh0w8mGHDQoD8RCsnkspsWpLT9DwsXDKv1rjgOOAsdag7ojuJulDyw%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9417b85618e944ae96674cfafde317a9&_e=sLdUfTwUITwWz_HT-EgM3tIBoXzo8zszCrh08YvZhVqiny3kzmEnMb-RvMSkBq0-rFw5DQqCCCKczr59ytE-dVcYotzy4ke4jaof34S_-4RySi5KbB3mL9aJlzME9uybjLk7xIdDWtrlH1I72qz3Rk9o_hfrEXuQ3YcecH4IkNb662xmjoBiZwI9VQnmuVrEzzTC78Hy4wZ5L_p1PugHzZr4v1wRKP8Gf2lVbLi4mGU01TVciCbSBA3mcZea_baFzLLMJK2AkIOlLZRIH7KAiEJsq4IrUyH5sVdoZcOjW8cBZbadfjtCaAwrQ8-rTLRQdYOEnkZPliO_zhMfTowqJHKXLTdcWumoiHB8bBl9szSD-JrWCyHckTLL5Ep3XQcGg75FEAw3oRbLoCd4xEmpyO57PIRO-93xA0e25CamAAE%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I'm running for President because we have a country to save! | | | | | | Hey Friend, it's Nikki. Do you have a minute to talk? | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59e8d522b13e473ea834294951ddab58&_e=6abfsww2gu4GEzja6146eXaNc5_uve7N2KdmnBUFNT7a4V_iOsXilsqqmv2D7I8BQpwqES6Lm6gmnY1gT1LMeFwoPPUn86CAw7_bWnTYq4kUuazqFo-AGC22F7bqI6p1gQWGJm_YnNfhCnObloEj6hhKsXUsr_-nHYHJeeDqNpq2tyBjEGPJz4AB_AwBYcLKdaco5BcWulCigM_ZUFfX66UUDkJ2l2-M9iQgulIFNDK1whxIWeW8nCAFSu669gFHea_hyDy5YhcnN2G4gGtY9fMhwSdeYRF_h3wragtl8YIQ6U47F_Xr7C3ig--c7n3O). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=59e8d522b13e473ea834294951ddab58&_e=6abfsww2gu4GEzja6146eXaNc5_uve7N2KdmnBUFNT7a4V_iOsXilsqqmv2D7I8BQpwqES6Lm6gmnY1gT1LMeFwoPPUn86CAw7_bWnTYq4kUuazqFo-AGC22F7bqI6p1gQWGJm_YnNfhCnObloEj6gYN-x2p5Nv8N7hGpaIvDZVacY9b7cgoDFHddcigVpiX8aaBgbOAPMGLQewG05aAVhXuwFzI_jG7zv_adDedkFxsw28QNzhpnmYReO5E8irNH7LfSJwF_foGP_AGvkNtKg04tlgj8N8qITYPj1X3KsJMXUe_WMIBPaTX5oTT7jQm) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. clean_body: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Today, we give thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Friend,
Thanksgiving is an incredibly special day.
While we love gathering with family and friends, watching football, and enjoying turkey dinner as much as the next American, Thanksgiving is about so much more.

**What we love most about Thanksgiving is the opportunity it gives us to take a break from our hectic day-to-day lives and reflect on ALL we have to be grateful for!**

Here at INGOP, we could not be more thankful for our families, our friends, our nation, and the opportunity we have to serve the state of Indiana.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bf516900b6ffd9d93947229f28c3afba/023559af1f9a5207c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
We’re so grateful for Hoosier Republicans like you and all your work to make Indiana a state where everyone has an opportunity to prosper. We should never underestimate the power of what we can accomplish together.

Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours! Indiana Republican Party

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7aa8e7218b484f32a7b8b898d43d27da&_e=oQ9g8_ruiG_ippTulzt4iFpPXpvBpuMSBF44v8qoXnfbhz4intPr3JYRxnRrfPGm8RD3qmWOO-OLnnAKWmHr3Ul3zFmunjHwTZ9bVwdg2QoJQ3JjOG-gxIGwt2ZLhodsRuWmA15l6QeTC0PyYt54c2cSjQ4MlTeCJ1YCgqrEiOBlxn545e4gWEXGRThp_iFkp6Xc80homs8PWT6GubilEZ40ifv9u6oA-2Jf-JB3Vbzix2siIqE7ryjYIEQiVRVLczJZ3ufJS7DmqEBycdWXbA_iZEXfSL5NDT6YuvKGDtipQ9EPWxnV5y7WH8mlrauC) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7aa8e7218b484f32a7b8b898d43d27da&_e=oQ9g8_ruiG_ippTulzt4iFpPXpvBpuMSBF44v8qoXnfbhz4intPr3JYRxnRrfPGm8RD3qmWOO-OLnnAKWmHr3Ul3zFmunjHwTZ9bVwdg2QoJQ3JjOG-gxIGwt2ZLhodsRuWmA15l6QeTC0PyYt54c5afGc5MWsu7G5hhVH_JilG5qDjN9v9rTewLq7sG2L2vB8HIhtBK99r2Gd6ybeLkV9Xzgx1FRuSlP0ALeo5QTIWRVAoS_erMFK55RMpIH2801OtmUcT06i9VDTqhlE8XEC2I8nMdEZpgNQqCVkcasQiGau1jXfDgRucS05cNHuFc) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7aa8e7218b484f32a7b8b898d43d27da&_e=oQ9g8_ruiG_ippTulzt4iFpPXpvBpuMSBF44v8qoXnfbhz4intPr3JYRxnRrfPGm8RD3qmWOO-OLnnAKWmHr3Ul3zFmunjHwTZ9bVwdg2QoJQ3JjOG-gxIGwt2ZLhodsRuWmA15l6QeTC0PyYt54czFoDHVgKVOZQIOj_43gqEmB8rOw9CIr1sMyZO1UUyTN3Ujyrla6Gp5-U6crGKvEs9UcTx5gilPmK6VlMZ-PUip9ebUy5UOGhENCLXvMd77f9OuRQgrFSn1mRbNKcw5fXSC5KQOy5LfcDnVTyXFi1YpHfvgIKYPmZnKRE4GxrxAP). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7aa8e7218b484f32a7b8b898d43d27da&_e=oQ9g8_ruiG_ippTulzt4iFpPXpvBpuMSBF44v8qoXnfbhz4intPr3JYRxnRrfPGm8RD3qmWOO-OLnnAKWmHr3Ul3zFmunjHwTZ9bVwdg2QoJQ3JjOG-gxIGwt2ZLhodsRuWmA15l6QeTC0PyYt54c95pMQxt9oclAfumSzdHGLdkgmNE63Yj1IdLTH2dUlVCz9OKThKQlb2xfU35PnxuM2i5khhLFNnpSgNBrMdXAPhvyX-IB11upMPD-QMCHaHdSElFBQTOK3EDDOkS4HR3BXCprpc07fUwSQ8-ol06292059KFjHt-z30Dfv7_95bE)

Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0cc44f4674c43cf8a0bf8a161b34c63&_e=jCH9zyNCsFQJuUfhINmo07AvvUkfirjalaNfQ67T2b_yv9PVAuXQrvrilWjb8A4U8sxbvV2kg5hADlw67WLfnhUhjz5hZkyf2ZY7U9gfwZA0g4kw5vrV9kpG_IzGIDuR9lDdE_pTnEX3ttwQ4CEJq4cjV1XPMWMznlvTDeRMoMpaLc05DR4x65kIAl_OdB8vXjpIrWNKESYHUrD1YK1q4iveJUcPuOE7aMKKrDDKv-XJPX58I0VP1PnsVfJ_j8_xBaeF_NJeCNXzNBIlWPUxSc6WA51zT7lLuOj2_FX63aFt-bmvn4hJ4Pjex9wB4rTXarRusCZd8L2ci5pp-DkpNBkUYdOmJeJJ5IlQLuBo1ayS50YE_qXbqwU2rTbRzyv5dF8FKATxyEuZWWjPi_XPVUyjMAOdgqRTo4RkVL3WYKU%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0cc44f4674c43cf8a0bf8a161b34c63&_e=jCH9zyNCsFQJuUfhINmo07AvvUkfirjalaNfQ67T2b_yv9PVAuXQrvrilWjb8A4U8sxbvV2kg5hADlw67WLfnhUhjz5hZkyf2ZY7U9gfwZA0g4kw5vrV9kpG_IzGIDuR9lDdE_pTnEX3ttwQ4CEJq4cjV1XPMWMznlvTDeRMoMpaLc05DR4x65kIAl_OdB8vXjpIrWNKESYHUrD1YK1q4iveJUcPuOE7aMKKrDDKv-XJPX58I0VP1PnsVfJ_j8_xBaeF_NJeCNXzNBIlWPUxSTjI6ApoYcB6rAQGYFderMy2InI2gXhITTkSJjqZ6i1UkpIMQbmS3lhspYsHOKwSyg6feUZCqantGwG2rMabyavK-P73IT9juAfCm3hotyAmzFoVsWVMrdW_XETxeJ_xzHpIrKquizNdKn5t-pm3af8%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0cc44f4674c43cf8a0bf8a161b34c63&_e=jCH9zyNCsFQJuUfhINmo07AvvUkfirjalaNfQ67T2b_yv9PVAuXQrvrilWjb8A4U8sxbvV2kg5hADlw67WLfnhUhjz5hZkyf2ZY7U9gfwZA0g4kw5vrV9kpG_IzGIDuR9lDdE_pTnEX3ttwQ4CEJq4cjV1XPMWMznlvTDeRMoMpaLc05DR4x65kIAl_OdB8vXjpIrWNKESYHUrD1YK1q4iveJUcPuOE7aMKKrDDKv-XJPX58I0VP1PnsVfJ_j8_xBaeF_NJeCNXzNBIlWPUxSacYsJXYxhgWevSI-RdtKpAT8VMiDZyie1s6CA5-YARuqL33iBjb4f60edyX7quR-pslfC8JgfmbJ71Qk9juzbj-1OfSRdDy4FHZZyJE1hF43harvRc8cP2d1RyGvMP6GLx51jv2SRfwntg3XQJ_z2k%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0cc44f4674c43cf8a0bf8a161b34c63&_e=jCH9zyNCsFQJuUfhINmo07AvvUkfirjalaNfQ67T2b_yv9PVAuXQrvrilWjb8A4U8sxbvV2kg5hADlw67WLfnhUhjz5hZkyf2ZY7U9gfwZA0g4kw5vrV9kpG_IzGIDuR9lDdE_pTnEX3ttwQ4CEJq4cjV1XPMWMznlvTDeRMoMpaLc05DR4x65kIAl_OdB8vXjpIrWNKESYHUrD1YK1q4iveJUcPuOE7aMKKrDDKv-XJPX58I0VP1PnsVfJ_j8_xBaeF_NJeCNXzNBIlWPUxSYSoTzV29zk7ooQk8MYwlSjQDjbqTjhyX699i8Wf-KJH0RHGv76YFpP7I3mvDgd4ZwdnRhm4Ki-sye4tPWAvhSp6n8srnD4CuiXibWK8hQM4k08y-dfYfUIO5EaB1RTnbUq7_rzDTkomm5jfZd3LKTY%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9964fe7357641e0bd4847455f0f53ce&_e=7j0kfFXrpDar552vlf6gpDKhme-kAaRpY4wicapDrCtMheK7MnEO87L1PaGA9teYLLo0S813Py54zB8b-Az_aRIy2tpKJpafVCjgomCTS9cVyrojFrAaSx6L1DA7fJrHIiBHTtn5qU_KGy854SBZCEsocdjWYdi-JaxB9hekDTysL1TZhmfMParCBabEkK-SwBUEkO0V7FRbEpi6xakKUa3VlT6fHXLCs4d7qjClFJXm7886NeHiR5P310TE85aXQD2m0xb2JYmyVbkpTqyhLNXV042CuHboed8u3nNqLQUsK4VK9Y8C9-w02ew834RU). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9964fe7357641e0bd4847455f0f53ce&_e=7j0kfFXrpDar552vlf6gpDKhme-kAaRpY4wicapDrCtMheK7MnEO87L1PaGA9teYLLo0S813Py54zB8b-Az_aRIy2tpKJpafVCjgomCTS9cVyrojFrAaSx6L1DA7fJrHIiBHTtn5qU_KGy854SBZCIsjUiawYxMXTrhso4JEPNboiq_EIM17yT1AgYp5_jfGEwYE7MgRM_u5evzEpE5_oHAqr8GS19X7rs7KRCw86pA825eE0tNXbW5XeKEH2nkREz1vXaHkZP9d0d8tE8SMFX3NsZa8ZmBYt6-cOxmhkqiBWDSIsfcWa7Nowm1Urgqs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9964fe7357641e0bd4847455f0f53ce&_e=7j0kfFXrpDar552vlf6gpDKhme-kAaRpY4wicapDrCtMheK7MnEO87L1PaGA9teYLLo0S813Py54zB8b-Az_aRIy2tpKJpafVCjgomCTS9cVyrojFrAaSx6L1DA7fJrHIiBHTtn5qU_KGy854SBZCA5MgHTFnQ6HgDkbCx4-U3VwYVMvrWGogP29x73Jk28yC1gcb2qnmJnxHUxmpxSSjPC7d0vtsURdK6Al4S_8M85BlDWj3ppOK01u-Od93KchrkEItiGUDx5I_9657A9nxoNSgicQtLD1U2DPpShNLPXVzEE4keVTxe47T99MsoEO) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=926ac95459cd4ea09ba861441097d48c&_e=xmMWbIjVhLKHJ_GSa5MIJGADoybbw8FBnktfZdgvsmkF_ZPECpUzspI4O5x5ZSRq3jNjskr9fxeJ0TBngZ-3Kj10-EfI1qjkDCiCTqskV7-9w7you-2jLe6tCYXcAPjs9oEbbMq6Gpso8WQ-xvQ8wTm0M27oHs7Pv18kz75TJWJ_vVM0sS2YQ_nqWJFAiiwWdJgo0lliqNFshEndTSvWgd7wCwe7qW5OGhD7YpIAx9CCCY7hr2zeDAsfwvsSH09F "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=926ac95459cd4ea09ba861441097d48c&_e=xmMWbIjVhLKHJ_GSa5MIJGADoybbw8FBnktfZdgvsmkF_ZPECpUzspI4O5x5ZSRq3jNjskr9fxeJ0TBngZ-3Kj10-EfI1qjkDCiCTqskV79bH0IxpCLiwVgkmVMsKK14WbM0tJkhuvvhdS6EN5W87OwzKsqt3NiCRkkCaWnitkC-wYzj4V1NRxUrXNL2K8nV0IakFvdEODT04A34wlOZvnIN-xsjfw5o7QbAwaIm_k1hi16inyFOyJjRIgGXAbzd)[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=926ac95459cd4ea09ba861441097d48c&_e=xmMWbIjVhLKHJ_GSa5MIJGADoybbw8FBnktfZdgvsmkF_ZPECpUzspI4O5x5ZSRq3jNjskr9fxeJ0TBngZ-3Kj10-EfI1qjkDCiCTqskV7-zN9oz3go0xR2zpSkv_gsgufsRmkWemUuER4TKyQmckarJdRhAnTkbzs8Ae0oXCAy0CjpT44tIAGHjNXD2eBwicMHgfmuNUhUne5WasMNLbxupPe12n58LnjulSSVH2KbPeVAVRBOx3rj1V5Pf5ZRv)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=926ac95459cd4ea09ba861441097d48c&_e=xmMWbIjVhLKHJ_GSa5MIJGADoybbw8FBnktfZdgvsmkF_ZPECpUzspI4O5x5ZSRq3jNjskr9fxeJ0TBngZ-3Kj10-EfI1qjkDCiCTqskV7-NRg68_vzNOrnwkwRPWN_TLsL8TdKgBNUHv2Bn4Kyt_eycxBkdzKMlyDpYFMkjHxhRDonrHpjViY_AtWYf2Gb9i7i-Xjlob2-BSNMznUFUbJQ2rvwPo9qbJ-aRP_A21uDCnpkENMn9k7RMu90ReMs0)

[Donate](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=926ac95459cd4ea09ba861441097d48c&_e=xmMWbIjVhLKHJ_GSa5MIJGADoybbw8FBnktfZdgvsmkF_ZPECpUzspI4O5x5ZSRq3jNjskr9fxeJ0TBngZ-3Kj10-EfI1qjkDCiCTqskV78mmltNTKQQo35H-uXdK9b7cehhY50b3xIRFhlAzNgl5vr8a3oH8eXpg4l4SjfvucARRD-EOrx9SLbFBxySmfPyuRVF9sKfGrg_lljVZV3CsVxeQS72kF5_nC6h2Hkq6nlz8otfpwQ66TI-8o9vci62)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/K2lKJW-TXQnrF3xpLN8Z7A~~/AARclAA~)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/K2lKJW-TXQnrF3xpLN8Z7A~~/AARclAA~)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/K2lKJW-TXQnrF3xpLN8Z7A~~/AARclAA~)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Freedom Report
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cM-VVvtoQkQjSF49ixzFRQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQc2YP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuYW1lcmljYW5mcmVlZG9tcmVwb3J0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZVVnO19lUU47iFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Z7YczuniUePHZBqqvvDu3g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQc2YP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbmZyZWVkb21yZXBvcnQuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplVWc7X2VRTjuIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Russell Prescott
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
Wishing you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018T3lEbZpKzSRTh2E3XvYF5oOIOd0YXLXnsmLl5-L4V13k1Pz0cxZvAmoSRbb3_X32wH7CHFPugGTWQteXWnOYVy1btu-L6IHBR-e6xb9OynTeEKkSKK-1-OwYrfp-nERHUigc4evK-z-ECWeTwPdHldsTjzlg9cP&c=keSt0TAOpDwqaiQlEmYrwMzgRpYYzEAPxKGkShhC-0w5W_T7m7nI-w==&ch=_oE5BeJZF6U2iPLUnNDdrKQkQ-xnj-pA7jGMHLsGW7E8DViV0OPQJA==)
---
| Peter,
As we come together to celebrate Thanksgiving, let us take a moment to reflect on the values that bind us as a nation--gratitude, unity, and the shared pursuit of a better future for all. In the spirit of this holiday, may we set aside our differences, embrace the diversity that defines us, and find common ground that fosters understanding and cooperation. I want to thank you for your unwavering support and dedication. That has been the driving force behind our shared mission for a stronger New Hampshire. May your day be adorned with the love of family and friends, the delicious aroma of Thanksgiving feasts, and the simple joys that make this season so special.
Susan and I wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018T3lEbZpKzSRTh2E3XvYF5oOIOd0YXLXnsmLl5-L4V13k1Pz0cxZvAmoSRbb3_X32wH7CHFPugGTWQteXWnOYVy1btu-L6IHBR-e6xb9OynTeEKkSKK-1-OwYrfp-nERHUigc4evK-z-ECWeTwPdHldsTjzlg9cP&c=keSt0TAOpDwqaiQlEmYrwMzgRpYYzEAPxKGkShhC-0w5W_T7m7nI-w==&ch=_oE5BeJZF6U2iPLUnNDdrKQkQ-xnj-pA7jGMHLsGW7E8DViV0OPQJA==)

| [PrescottforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018T3lEbZpKzSRTh2E3XvYF5oOIOd0YXLXnsmLl5-L4V13k1Pz0cxZvMoikhiUcfJUGfkRKavrUGpRr6B5bw78Z3W2DPdPkCtEy5g-lPYNKrlvP-O-J-Lb7fmYPR1SXU9cAzl528euoI9VT_uBFtKzjWdG4DsLUqWt&c=keSt0TAOpDwqaiQlEmYrwMzgRpYYzEAPxKGkShhC-0w5W_T7m7nI-w==&ch=_oE5BeJZF6U2iPLUnNDdrKQkQ-xnj-pA7jGMHLsGW7E8DViV0OPQJA==)
---
| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---
|
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018T3lEbZpKzSRTh2E3XvYF5oOIOd0YXLXnsmLl5-L4V13k1Pz0cxZvMoikhiUcfJU5fl13hvPxTtTJwXL66ViZES_czAAFAw94hPgRJltjCE3aI6innpVNGl4upSCo3lirafm3zIneJUQN1KSriTSaVeNe5BElImgIE2oU5f9KzY=&c=keSt0TAOpDwqaiQlEmYrwMzgRpYYzEAPxKGkShhC-0w5W_T7m7nI-w==&ch=_oE5BeJZF6U2iPLUnNDdrKQkQ-xnj-pA7jGMHLsGW7E8DViV0OPQJA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018T3lEbZpKzSRTh2E3XvYF5oOIOd0YXLXnsmLl5-L4V13k1Pz0cxZvMoikhiUcfJUwON1uNIgOLafK-analDjYX8dVgmmAkpT7pmuliaRgn_-KKfu-9aUZuROoUqLQGADNM_N4HzNoEq1hbiWDbXCWRXawUDlNCPI&c=keSt0TAOpDwqaiQlEmYrwMzgRpYYzEAPxKGkShhC-0w5W_T7m7nI-w==&ch=_oE5BeJZF6U2iPLUnNDdrKQkQ-xnj-pA7jGMHLsGW7E8DViV0OPQJA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018T3lEbZpKzSRTh2E3XvYF5oOIOd0YXLXnsmLl5-L4V13k1Pz0cxZvMoikhiUcfJUEj5b7AQj9bVYkWMjrs9U-vHauO5vDi2RHDZgBl4miz_iZZF4t29joRq3Y3Y2x0x5gbqJuk3ZGdzSDb854ymxv2nwVAIK88rWd725WKxJ_Z0UDXlOlMfMCg==&c=keSt0TAOpDwqaiQlEmYrwMzgRpYYzEAPxKGkShhC-0w5W_T7m7nI-w==&ch=_oE5BeJZF6U2iPLUnNDdrKQkQ-xnj-pA7jGMHLsGW7E8DViV0OPQJA==)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Giving thanks
body:
| | |
---
On behalf of my family and my entire Tea Party Patriots Action team, I want to wish you and your loved ones a wonderful Thanksgiving and holiday weekend!
---
| |
---
| I’ve been thinking this morning about the things I am most grateful for – my family, my faith, and the incredible opportunity to live in the greatest country on earth. _Today, as we face so much suffering and the evil in the world, I’m reminded of the entirety of Psalms 69, but I want to focus on verse 30 (NIV),**“I will praise the name of God with a song; I will magnify him with thanksgiving.”**_
---
| | Even during times like these, let us remember to praise God and give thanks to Him. If you are traveling, I wish you safe travels, and I hope you enjoy the time you have with family and friends. Happy Thanksgiving! Grateful for you,Jenny Beth Martin
---
|
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2d4cb5f472142b0bc236b28cd0b7f63&_e=Us8iR-XTITCerzIytI8_y-fkcz7F167OarkWmclSVCV9vrqobHYGm1LV9Y6KmzDcFzeFy-H22bxXGAvQcXmTx7efzLF4sa91LK9Pg4uhPHxFjzZXPus4z1X6V8_3EsTm5KjRugDbxqtHUmvYPb9syvmhnngGP0QKVAV7s34f2iyupMw7oiKiYDSQ1fQmZZfdzen7yRQJK1KvsLOcInJ_j4Ti-PwVXtZyd4hhEolqW0Qf7I_VFd-DdKxxiLshULkV "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2d4cb5f472142b0bc236b28cd0b7f63&_e=Us8iR-XTITCerzIytI8_y-fkcz7F167OarkWmclSVCV9vrqobHYGm1LV9Y6KmzDcFzeFy-H22bxXGAvQcXmTx7efzLF4sa91LK9Pg4uhPHwDK1IjoRRxss2TLRHgn4nsNAIm2K1EYDt1HzHxMVeKgtJ2qDbHCzc0CebT3bogUIXLxTxOzUSksf9fWHXbH_uyjWlanM1wFmplAQ-f74HjZtHRWqOaWGKHHp2kzKsv7xY-sEvNZXCHPzp43c0Vz4Be)[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2d4cb5f472142b0bc236b28cd0b7f63&_e=Us8iR-XTITCerzIytI8_y-fkcz7F167OarkWmclSVCV9vrqobHYGm1LV9Y6KmzDcFzeFy-H22bxXGAvQcXmTx7efzLF4sa91LK9Pg4uhPHynvkx28L6y79CkIaT_8V6gEsYDKzE-X_lVTleFAtgtlvIH8imvDNBQRNYk1NonVP0cMyAK4okfCazEG1KbtL3f3QUSaNDYjcRlnB4xDcOxN8ACVYtquSw0ZCWCWzz4il5bIX0WnbyowJt9GKJv2lze)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2d4cb5f472142b0bc236b28cd0b7f63&_e=Us8iR-XTITCerzIytI8_y-fkcz7F167OarkWmclSVCV9vrqobHYGm1LV9Y6KmzDcFzeFy-H22bxXGAvQcXmTx7efzLF4sa91LK9Pg4uhPHyieJJ3T1DqEjcKmaYl-iiHxd0xr6zsqJEalPbM4HUdkbX6pQsfySa5zadMs8ZY2ugjZMqSvc2liu9-U4y_rUBVOgx5Q36-xxq3-m3scKBIh0LjJuTT07BfFiSQ_Syk-1MUzxgktewxaXMS3fUiJTzF)

[Donate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2d4cb5f472142b0bc236b28cd0b7f63&_e=Us8iR-XTITCerzIytI8_y-fkcz7F167OarkWmclSVCV9vrqobHYGm1LV9Y6KmzDcFzeFy-H22bxXGAvQcXmTx7efzLF4sa91LK9Pg4uhPHyafkutpim1OSRC4y6xIB4VXjN37lbWYLpqQ8DVp1FidpOu7MJ2DvwLk_1eQkfL4DfwGkE-z3zM6HSNzD0sIxyCvIqM05aqIK9TmmNgRWzTGiZtIkamdQ033furT_PFa4kKS6Bcyjzd8vprn986Y_Si)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.
