Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=785db38ca0e64fd6b1caad7caa1d7b59&_e=PLm52zuxUXEDRQvi-v0685y0wQGxpPOg42YBbQjZOiAUehUB0QNGUHmI7pwc-F8Qriz87LUdJxhRk0D1KmFGvrr8ILk6T_KHfHNYVZd17ehCDQ2pGbMybjVNHVD-QBiGxJH-h61ZlrpZ8scrqLbgEehLxovdYUIfnVxjxlWxdDFlupv1tWfGofimeMCrn_JC1wjrBR-i-09k7g8pFoxjXxvXvdUl3ZCSFCnf-43UE2JM3p_JzKHKJ-W6i3cYG1nJUNdj3HcuLiE-Gm2l5RgxjCFnNRdRfWc8Ltqw64WDThCWBYpFrbz9FGF4C7zNnlr0) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=785db38ca0e64fd6b1caad7caa1d7b59&_e=PLm52zuxUXEDRQvi-v0685y0wQGxpPOg42YBbQjZOiAUehUB0QNGUHmI7pwc-F8Qriz87LUdJxhRk0D1KmFGvrr8ILk6T_KHfHNYVZd17ehCDQ2pGbMybjVNHVD-QBiGxJH-h61ZlrpZ8scrqLbgESuyWj5lyybjcv9HgPGU8ENwyoX_FOU0TM6BtkIDRo0tMsgWFrxlmu0EVfdwy9XgQKhiN8rwszCNJiAxdS32Nm-X9FcPTv3xJfFxS8EiQF0jNiVR33VLtbROsOEDJawftJAyUPzz7dqpSblr59tUhhrhtyzu9Dd3fZCbHA_khZom). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=785db38ca0e64fd6b1caad7caa1d7b59&_e=PLm52zuxUXEDRQvi-v0685y0wQGxpPOg42YBbQjZOiAUehUB0QNGUHmI7pwc-F8Qriz87LUdJxhRk0D1KmFGvrr8ILk6T_KHfHNYVZd17ehCDQ2pGbMybjVNHVD-QBiGxJH-h61ZlrpZ8scrqLbgERmZnmrHPAWC41lG2cA3L7GBuz80ghVeEMKIr_JVLJlCGXsU8arbi7d0yDSXjngHiI7bSNFpqUQJdxWXzjkvaSIkTTesASyOPw1mb9o7xvtRuv4hxsq3DiLM-EeZEIYydf4WanC3EzZbCVe8ToHDRzpxwb6-ZQ8QNTrt5YKBjx8k)

FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Casey4Congress
subject: Have a safe and wonderful Thanksgiving.
body:
Happy Thanksgiving!
| | | |
---
Dear All,
Happy Thanksgiving to each of you! As we come together in our homes, surrounded by family and friends, let's treasure the beautiful moments we're creating today. Wishing you a season filled with abundance, growth, and prosperity. Stay safe and enjoy a truly wonderful Thanksgiving.
---
---
Sincerely,

subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative,

**We just wanted to reach out to our valued supporters to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving!**
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.-rutiA)
---
There’s no doubt we’re living in precarious times. Events around the world have shaken us to our core, our border is a mess, and we’re all feeling the pain of the Biden economy.

Yet still we keep hope alive to get our great nation back on track, and we’re blessed to have conservative patriots on board with us to make it happen.

We all have so much to be thankful for in our lives, from family and friends to good health to food on our tables. _And here at Team Cruz, we’re thankful for YOU_!

All the best wishes for a wonderful Thanksgiving today.

\- Ted Cruz & Team Cruz

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: YOU are the reason
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
Our coalition of pro-democracy Republicans, Democrats, and independents has been able to defend the very essence of America: democracy.
|
---
Friend,

Without you, the Republican Accountability Project wouldn’t exist. That’s why I’m thankful for _your_ support this Thanksgiving. Our ever-growing coalition of pro-democracy Republicans, Democrats, and independents has been able to defend the very essence of America: democracy. And we’re going to keep doing it in 2024. When you tell your stories and share our work with your friends and family, you are playing an indispensable role in our battle to protect American democracy. These things add up! So thank you. Thanks for supporting us. Thanks for continuing to share our message. And, most importantly, thanks for standing up for what's right. Have a great Thanksgiving, and let’s get ready for 2024. Sarah Longwell
Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project
---

name: Matt Dolan
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO
body:
|

---
Thanksgiving is a time to reminisce and give thanks for everything we’ve seen in the past year: the good and the bad. We should be thankful for everything that’s led us to this moment.

Life itself is a gift from God — and all the experiences over the past year should make us thankful for every single moment on this earth. The time we spend with friends and family is a blessing. Today, I’m only asking you to enjoy yourself and give thanks for everything and anything that’s happened over the past year.

Our experiences mold us into who we are, and I want to be the first to thank you for your support.

This is our last Thanksgiving before the 2024 election — and your support has meant the world to me and my family.

**From me and everyone in the Dolan family, Happy Thanksgiving!**

Best,

Matt Dolan

Life itself is a gift from God — and all the experiences over the past year should make us thankful for every single moment on this earth. The time we spend with friends and family is a blessing. Today, I’m only asking you to enjoy yourself and give thanks for everything and anything that’s happened over the past year. Our experiences mold us into who we are, and I want to be the first to thank you for your support. This is our last Thanksgiving before the 2024 election — and your support has meant the world to me and my family. From me and everyone in the Dolan family, Happy Thanksgiving! Best, Matt Dolan | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from my family to yours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=12a9f53dcb1d6f490eee95d8a47cb5a45fcc17217bb4255326790cb8ad6e0792b149b2f98320529a0f4f7e91b164583f012ed63891c8bccf020592df89a6fd36ba6feea5f9670b717e93cdb54178742f

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be2e34f7a000920f8ab29b05b39d012d8e43cb54569bb427f82ceab3b42abeee4efbcbe51a3d4063e6052752ed244a4b11b5ea1739193c8a694

Happy Thanksgiving, friend!

President George Washington issued a proclamation for “a day of public thanksgiving and prayer” for the American people to “acknowledge with grateful hearts the many signal favors of Almighty God, especially by affording them an opportunity peaceably to establish a form of government for their safety and happiness" 234 years ago, and still today, we honor that by reminding ourselves how blessed we are to be Americans.

I have a lot to be thankful for. Today I am taking a moment to appreciate the blessings in my life—especially my wonderful wife Casey and our three healthy kids, Madison, Mason, and Mamie.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be2e34f7a000920f8ab29b05b39d012d8e43cb54569bb427f82ceab3b42abeee4efbcbe51a3d4063e6052752ed244a4b11b5ea1739193c8a694

I am thankful to be an American today and every day. While our country has faced so many problems in recent years, we have the capacity to solve these problems and to bring about brighter days. And I look forward to restoring the pride and gratitude all Americans used to hold for this great nation in the years ahead.

I will fight to make you proud, and keep America free, friend. I hope you enjoy some fellowship and time well spent with your own family today. And know, our best years are yet to come.

God bless,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be2e34f7a000920f8ab29b05b39d012d8e43cb54569bb427f82ceab3b42abeee4efbcbe51a3d4063e6052752ed244a4b11b5ea1739193c8a694

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be2e34f7a000920f8ab29b05b39d012d8e43cb54569bb427f82ceab3b42abeee4efbcbe51a3d4063e6052752ed244a4b11b5ea1739193c8a694
Support Ron DeSantis for President

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be271b40fb758e53c4c9e37000026a634c64ab6d463d913f672e52279ac6c6e2b3b3d1c89d8a523ee3176b4b7ec14e0bfe8190eadd0e02d1706

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be2d7af04db1a410b4d4ef5d2d2818b9ae88263394218648d7363d973a0fc30915f18ae99e9da5b32037e09c5edf626cfa955cbfd9ad758b0d8
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be2e34f7a000920f8ab29b05b39d012d8e43cb54569bb427f82ceab3b42abeee4efbcbe51a3d4063e6052752ed244a4b11b5ea1739193c8a694

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cf94443a600c7be2e34f7a000920f8ab29b05b39d012d8e43cb54569bb427f82ceab3b42abeee4efbcbe51a3d4063e6052752ed244a4b11b5ea1739193c8a694

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

---
Peter, Thanksgiving is a special time each year for us to gather with family and to reflect on the many blessings we have in our lives.

In these troubling days when chaos here at home and around the globe may bring moments of anxiety and despair, by coming together for the holidays we can take a break from that stress and cherish the time we share with those we love.

Let us also be mindful of those who may be alone or in need of help. Reach out if you can to make a positive impact on their lives this Thanksgiving.

Karen and I are wishing you a very happy Thanksgiving holiday!
---
Sincerely, -John
---
| | |
---

body:
And Biden Admin May Pull Funding From Colleges With Pro-Hamas Student Groups, Experts Say

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674452%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JEucUOP47dIDwNULOYzbwA&sysid=1 DAVID BLACKMON: What Happens In Germany Sadly Doesn’t Stay In Germany

The German government, led by Chancellor Olaf Scholz, seems in near panic now after a court ruling disallowed a proposed reallocation of 60 billion (roughly $66 billion) in unused COVID funds for more green subsidies. Reuters reports Scholz and his ministers reacted by freezing proposals for new spending on programs to help the country’s struggling industrial sector.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariela=20Roca?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=434952b2a2&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---
# 🦃 Let’s Give Thanks for our Blessings 🍁
As Thanksgiving approaches, it's a time for us to pause, reflect, and express our gratitude for the blessings in our lives. This year, amidst the current political landscape, it's more important than ever to find common ground and unity despite our differences.
This Thanksgiving, I would like to extend my heartfelt thanks to you, our incredible Roca for Congress supporters. Your unwavering support, enthusiasm, and dedication have been the driving force behind our journey for Congress. I am profoundly grateful for each interaction, every conversation, and the trust you've placed in me.
No matter how you will be celebrating Thanksgiving this year, take a moment to reflect on the simple joys, the cherished connections, and the experiences that have shaped this year. Whether it's the laughter shared with loved ones, the resilience demonstrated during trying times, or the small victories that brought a smile to your face—these are the moments that truly define the spirit of Thanksgiving.
At Roca for Congress, we're honored to have you as part of our family. Your support inspires us to strive for excellence and fuels our commitment to getting to Congress to support you and your families every single day.
We wish you and your family a Thanksgiving filled with joy, gratitude, and the spirit of togetherness.
Sincerely,
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=20c1a4f692&e=0a12281e0e)

## Thanksgiving donations!
Earlier this week, I had the privilege of helping 2 different events donate over **500** Thanksgiving meals to families in need. I've committed myself to do these events yearly, wish I could help more families in need.
| | |

Contribute to the fight for our future today! If everyone on this list would please support us by donating, we would surpass our August goal! And if you can make it a reoccurring monthly donation, consider it a "**Subscription to Democracy!** " I hope you can help us reach our critical goal before tonight's midnight deadline.

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
https://www.depasqualeforag.com/ [https://www.depasqualeforag.com/] Happy Thanksgiving, folks!

Today, I want to take a moment to express my appreciation for Pennsylvania and this grassroots team.

Serving our Commonwealth as Auditor General was one of the greatest honors of my life.

Together, we made a lot of progress over the years. Whether it’s taking on waste, fraud, and abuse or defending the right to choose and the right to vote, I’m proud and thankful for what we’ve accomplished. But the work isn’t finished.

As long as extremists are attacking Pennsylvanians’ fundamental rights, I’ll continue to roll up my sleeves and get to work. That’s why I’m running to be PA’s next Attorney General.

I’m incredibly thankful for the folks I’ve met across Pennsylvania during this campaign so far. And I’m looking forward to maybe seeing you one day in Cresco too! I’m thankful for this team we are building to secure a better and brighter future for Pennsylvanians. And I’m thankful to my family and friends for supporting me along the way.

So thank you for being a part of this team, and enjoy your holiday.

– Eugene

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68567daffb4c453bab3a8f1d729ab87c&_e=AOO108PFXS8KuB7B8ei0TdBKZV1SkWvl33epOeZfGvAOAroWzIROxTjw9vLBft_KU_gYeN-Xm4C1nkkd2fhFd29PFMQE-N7jbRDfJEFahufyrurpXzQ1_ccFpxTMn-v3-1EqfzTBtDoBeZnDyMHOJ9QyMwwX1pFGGnleW9Bm85h_aIXiDWVzqnzoll92V5CVqdYDFk2Wsz7u8doKJ-EKAW0izJtZdMwBVG_lHxdIgqNmkZwtczTPw2ci2buN8I2P2z8-h_Av6hwpHp0SmC39rcaJmM3hK8GhC5LbAezNjdGfqKlJnOQuqTBKBG4mYqvzF2sMnyJm8ivvqDAAZ6AFuiJAX_I0f5il5-iPJW1Q2jN27h_IwiQyWJp8MTH0-deZp24l_6FLagU8e0pCNgsWyEx9A1axw7swaWlOZaONsz4%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68567daffb4c453bab3a8f1d729ab87c&_e=AOO108PFXS8KuB7B8ei0TdBKZV1SkWvl33epOeZfGvAOAroWzIROxTjw9vLBft_KU_gYeN-Xm4C1nkkd2fhFd29PFMQE-N7jbRDfJEFahufyrurpXzQ1_ccFpxTMn-v3-1EqfzTBtDoBeZnDyMHOJ9QyMwwX1pFGGnleW9Bm85h_aIXiDWVzqnzoll92V5CVqdYDFk2Wsz7u8doKJ-EKAW0izJtZdMwBVG_lHxdIgqNmkZwtczTPw2ci2buN8I2P2z8-h_Av6hwpHp0SmC39rSmIGEe-igI5qUXVnKO_7LJwrjc2njVbwQ6NFWY24E59ubLDGHqqlKmVnVAoVEJnEaObpO5wX8oo1loHKV_m7AXI5jHUwNAcKLbwmWGZiqjyeVgb1IesKS-Qi56d37GffVI0XxeHXdrl_D_qKrIljuo%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68567daffb4c453bab3a8f1d729ab87c&_e=AOO108PFXS8KuB7B8ei0TdBKZV1SkWvl33epOeZfGvAOAroWzIROxTjw9vLBft_KU_gYeN-Xm4C1nkkd2fhFd29PFMQE-N7jbRDfJEFahufyrurpXzQ1_ccFpxTMn-v3-1EqfzTBtDoBeZnDyMHOJ9QyMwwX1pFGGnleW9Bm85h_aIXiDWVzqnzoll92V5CVqdYDFk2Wsz7u8doKJ-EKAW0izJtZdMwBVG_lHxdIgqNmkZwtczTPw2ci2buN8I2P2z8-h_Av6hwpHp0SmC39raU44b075g_DcG2jWq6xer88oLVpNTi7_ad7TaEOfQZIy9x7K6SO_WCZy8CMViqAnzXP_gzGdTXYpSAQdSj6i_jcURxKRDJIYdGJFkwIlQ58aEMRYXoMwGo_O-mBWPHts3sJy_ahoK5b38TEyKrWqG0%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68567daffb4c453bab3a8f1d729ab87c&_e=AOO108PFXS8KuB7B8ei0TdBKZV1SkWvl33epOeZfGvAOAroWzIROxTjw9vLBft_KU_gYeN-Xm4C1nkkd2fhFd29PFMQE-N7jbRDfJEFahufyrurpXzQ1_ccFpxTMn-v3-1EqfzTBtDoBeZnDyMHOJ9QyMwwX1pFGGnleW9Bm85h_aIXiDWVzqnzoll92V5CVqdYDFk2Wsz7u8doKJ-EKAW0izJtZdMwBVG_lHxdIgqNmkZwtczTPw2ci2buN8I2P2z8-h_Av6hwpHp0SmC39rWliqz1ee2vm1EgBNP1PKXKo2J9p55hsmWEO-vrXhHn8-g8VCmcgKBv3o9QuU2gqPnhtn-1DcbfjvQ2I83vUrzRIa7KdSTpYgB12HW2m8nb9qnVcd5TPDeVCE7MGL5jwrVMmKvgyoQUBaXtYXXMP3yE%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Suzanne=20Crouch?=
subject: Wishing you a joyful and blessed Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
As Hoosier families gather around tables across our beautiful state today, I️ want to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.

Wishing you a joyful and blessed Thanksgiving!
As Hoosier families gather around tables across our beautiful state today, I️ want to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.

This season of gratitude is an opportunity to reflect on the many blessings that enrich our lives. Today, I am immensely grateful for my friends and family and for the profound blessing of being able to represent you and fight for you.

This time of gratitude and thanks has further reinforced my commitment to safeguarding our Hoosier values—those anchored in faith, family, and freedom—and to eliminating Indiana's individual income tax, putting more money back in your pockets.
The spirit of gratitude is deeply ingrained in us as Hoosiers, and I am thankful for the unwavering support and camaraderie you bring to this campaign!

As you enjoy precious moments with family and friends today, please also remember those who may be facing challenges during this time. Reach out to your loved ones, check in on friends, and hold each other close during this holiday season.

May your homes be filled with laughter, your tables with abundance, and your hearts with gratitude.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!

clean_body: As Hoosier families gather around tables across our beautiful state today, I️ want to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving. Wishing you a joyful and blessed Thanksgiving! As Hoosier families gather around tables across our beautiful state today, I️ want to take a moment to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving. This season of gratitude is an opportunity to reflect on the many blessings that enrich our lives. Today, I am immensely grateful for my friends and family and for the profound blessing of being able to represent you and fight for you. This time of gratitude and thanks has further reinforced my commitment to safeguarding our Hoosier values—those anchored in faith, family, and freedom—and to eliminating Indiana's individual income tax, putting more money back in your pockets. The spirit of gratitude is deeply ingrained in us as Hoosiers, and I am thankful for the unwavering support and camaraderie you bring to this campaign! As you enjoy precious moments with family and friends today, please also remember those who may be facing challenges during this time. Reach out to your loved ones, check in on friends, and hold each other close during this holiday season. May your homes be filled with laughter, your tables with abundance, and your hearts with gratitude. Happy Thanksgiving, Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email! mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website ()

name: Ryan Busse
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Busse for Montana, PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904, Democrat
body:
Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=UDmUu2VR20BV4dUc9KWm6f9dDEhrLwF4%2BMqJkamODxqlUptv7fr%2Ff%2BspgeP3%2FVWifvF5q6L775Deso9c2X2w4xvpcq9XOVlsUaymco%2F%2BzO2iG5nrQJC2c5lRoyp5yU%2F6rSNVKyZaytMDRk71MS9keW9NAIlWiXE6wu5ajvbvDWoEdWwzTTZ6Hk1oY23prDyaWSgdapdgwtTpGKDA%2F0pGIR6kgqsZAEvnYq5tKFq%2FfmpIrhqZ6NC39fHh1pLXDBbbX8SaC%2FWp0Yuhjxm5yOvVM%2FEndbCwGmbDgGviKSDiGK8ip0jtbUAmLlvOdmh9EtsVwKaVF2vdpwA1KnYJuZU%2BuWu1aVaUa9T1MvnWCfo5gIpXZtQ4rTnkJ4AVoedHIMvg7fW431iLiXgygBq0HGUI2%2FcjPsF%2BUHtNVanHXOlrOsoGM5lTEXmWeifpC86V7ied]

# [#]

I’m feeling really grateful today, Peter.

This year and every year, Sara and I take this time to reflect. We’re thankful for our healthy two boys, our bird dogs, and this beautiful state we call home.

And this year, we’ve got something else to be thankful for: you.

When Sara and I initially discussed me running for governor, we knew there’d be folks who’d be all in. But what we didn’t anticipate was the community of good people who’d turn out in droves to generously share their stories and their hopes for the future. Good people who decided to put their trust in me and this movement for a better Montana. And I really couldn’t be more grateful.

These past two months have been a whirlwind, so today, I can’t wait to eat the Thanksgiving birds that my son and I got ourselves, sit around the fireplace with family and friends, and count our blessings. I hope you’re doing the same.

Thank you for everything,

Ryan

We should be terrified of their anti-freedom agenda. Greg Gianforte is the problem. He’s already raised your taxes, ignored the high cost of housing, lied to Montanans, and even went jet-setting in Italy while Montanans had to deal with record-breaking floods. He’s just getting started. Ryan is ready to deliver “a new brand for Montana,” and protect the Last Best Place from Greg Gianforte’s dangerous, failed leadership.

name: Bob Casey
subject: What did the turkey say when he met the president?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Pardon me.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1204%2E552475%2EwvcUkI)
Happy Thanksgiving, Peter.
My favorite thing about Thanksgiving is being with my family, having some delicious turkey and stuffing, and telling a _cornucopia_ of dad jokes.
I’ve been asked to stop, but I couldn’t quit _cold turkey_ — so if you’re not _fed_ up with my jokes yet, here’s one more:
_What do you call a running turkey? Fast food._
In all seriousness, as we look ahead to 2024, we’re in for a tough race. That’s why now more than ever, I’m grateful for you. With your continued support, I’m confident that we can protect this seat and our Senate majority.
I can’t wait to see what we accomplish together by next November.
From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving. I hope you have a delicious meal and a safe holiday.
— Bob Casey
P.S. My team had me do what they call a “fishbowl video” where I answered a number of icebreaker questions about Thanksgiving. It was pretty fun, so I hope you’ll **[check it out here.](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/588?t=2&akid=1204%2E552475%2EwvcUkI)**

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: A lot to be thankful for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, from my family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving!

Derek, from my family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving! We hope you’re getting to spend this day with loved ones, enjoying the comforts of a family meal. I’m mindful today that law enforcement, first responders, our National Guard, and other servicemen and women aren’t able to relax at the table because they’re out keeping us safe. We owe them a debt of gratitude. I’m thankful for them. I’m also grateful for this grassroots team that has had my back every step of the way. And as we continue our work to bring real freedom and real opportunity across Pennsylvania, I’m honored to have you by my side. From working to raise the minimum wage to ensuring abortion rights stay protected here, I’m excited to stay in this fight with you to bring real freedom and opportunity to working families across the Commonwealth. As we enter the holiday season, I wish every Pennsylvanian good health, happiness, and good fortune for the year ahead. Happy Thanksgiving, – Josh Shapiro

---

name: Becca Balint
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
From the bottom of my heart, I am so thankful for every single person reading this message.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73851771/439843518/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTIyZjIwYS0wYThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysfVQpCGYGUsMapcb7iA11MCOhxZZADpaOUgtVnr6i8=&emci=0b7e9d2d-4889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=7a22f20a-0a8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Happy Thanksgiving, Peter! **From the bottom of my heart, I am so thankful for every single person reading this message.** You all – my supporters, friends, and fellow Vermonters – helped us make history last year, then turned around and supported me every step of the way during my first year in Congress. The phrase “it takes a village” has a whole new meaning behind it now. You are the beating heart of this movement, and your support means everything to me. Thank you. And of course, above all, I’m thankful for my family: My parents, my siblings and extended family members. I am endlessly grateful to my spouse, Elizabeth, and to our two kids, who have all made great sacrifices to get me to this place. **One thousand thank yous will never be enough.** As you prepare to gather around the Thanksgiving table, please know that I am incredibly thankful for you, for the community we’ve built, and for all of the exciting things ahead. And to anyone spending the holiday working — whether it be at a hospital, retirement home, grocery store or other essential service, I am thinking of you today and am endlessly grateful for your sacrifice. Happy Thanksgiving! —Becca Balint
---

* * *

Happy Thanksgiving! —Becca Balint If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Nixon?=
subject: Giving Thanks for Our Nation!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Nixon for Congress 2024
body:
A Thanksgiving Message from Michael Nixon | | | | | |
---
[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=3f621c1d8f&e=cc1921084c)
|
---
Friend, As Thanksgiving approaches, I am filled with a profound sense of gratitude for the freedoms we hold dear and the sacrifices made by our veterans to secure them. Today, I am reaching out to you with a deep sense of duty and a commitment to defend the values that make our nation strong.
I am a proud veteran, and my life of service has instilled in me a passion for protecting our great nation. Now, as I embark on a new mission—to represent you and our community in Congress—I am driven by the principles that have defined the American spirit for generations.
This Thanksgiving, as we gather with loved ones, let us also reflect on our duty to preserve the values that have made our nation a beacon of freedom. Your support is crucial to the success of this mission. I am honored to have the opportunity to earn your trust and represent our community in Congress.
This Thanksgiving, as we gather with loved ones, let us also reflect on our duty to preserve the values that have made our nation a beacon of freedom. Wishing you and your family a blessed Thanksgiving filled with gratitude, warmth, and the spirit of American resilience.
| [SUPPORT ISRAEL’S DEFENSE](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=8b7d04e562&e=cc1921084c)

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=901a0c993e7c415f9d0d955b90244616&_e=j6kxqVUmbPxNRxyHazjhM1qLHdjT_uqogaTAlM_zJwdwh7laAQLwPR6FF0VRPrzAPUzIMHIwVyvwxPB6yhwVwcMrk9gPYtvHS2ShtBJbg8_vrx5Yn_GEE2C5iaoUBM6cnBjcRotmFZ_JDoglGR7WaBABl3R0gb_UQFf4fRBCzjgKah5a4HmydboD2hyWiZW1EKgcNDM0J63QRpM5_y7jFw%3D%3D)
---
Happy Thanksgiving, my friend! As we gather around tables surrounded by family and friends, I want you to know how deeply thankful I am for having the privilege to represent you in Congress.
Each and every day, but especially today, I am filled with gratitude for my wonderful family, the precious freedoms we cherish, and the support you've shown me. Your commitment to upholding our cherished values here in Wisconsin means a lot to me.

From my family to yours, I extend the warmest wishes for a joyous and fulfilling Thanksgiving celebration!

Cordially,**Glenn Grothman**

Happy Thanksgiving!

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: What I’m thankful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Happy Thanksgiving, team! I know that you all can’t wait to spend some time with your loved ones, eat a lot of good food, and watch some football **(Go Lions!).** But before you do, I hope you’ll take a moment to read this brief message. We’ve accomplished _a lot_ of good things in Michigan. We’ve protected _and_ expanded access to abortion. We’ve made Michigan a top clean energy leader. We’ve expanded worker’s rights and strengthened gun laws to make communities across Michigan safer for our families and children. And we’ve been able to take our movement nationwide, supporting Democrats and causes in places like Ohio and Kansas that are committed to defending working people and protecting our fundamental freedoms. I’ve said this many times before, but **none of this would have been possible without you.** Your support has fueled our work, and thanks to you, we’ve been able to reach millions of people and share our message. Together, we’re creating a better future for Michiganders and Americans across the country. Your commitment to our movement means the world to me, and I can’t wait to continue on this journey with you as we head into 2024. Thank you, Gretchen Whitmer | ** ** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73853646/439851182/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20231123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJjODhiZGEtMGM4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xyOdL44vKHLq_r960d2nIJiZQlNda83kSzR4gz8kWgE=)**

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: From my family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Thank you so much for being part of my team, Peter.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73854056/439852847/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmI1ZjQ4OC0wZDhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S0XyNu9uY1K8Sh50aNWmbiTRrLccea0oNhSdWhyWcLU=&emci=d533a671-098a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=6fb5f488-0d8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=11703046) Happy Thanksgiving to you and your loved ones, Peter!

This year, I wanted to take a moment to express how thankful I am for you, Peter. It was just over a year ago that, together, we made history in Northeast Ohio. I’m grateful for the opportunity to serve as your Congresswoman for Ohio’s 13th Congressional District and it means so much to me that you’re still with me fighting for our community.

We’re in for another tough fight next year, but I know that when our people-powered team works together _anything is possible._

So once again, thank you for being part of my team. I hope you have a safe and happy Thanksgiving!

_Emilia Sykes_
---

| Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/Thanksgiving%2023%20%28Twitter%20Post%29.png]

Peter,

The team here at the Indiana Democratic Party just wanted to drop a quick note and wish you and your family a happy and safe Thanksgiving!

It’s not always easy being a Democrat in Indiana — and that’s why we’re incredibly thankful to have you with us in this fight.

We know that we can build a stronger state where every family has healthcare, access to affordable childcare, and strong schools.

Together, we’re bringing back balance to our state and putting working families first.

Happy Thanksgiving!
Indiana Democratic Party

body:

Friends-
From all of us at Freedom Virginia, we’d like to wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving! We are grateful for the support you’ve given our organization and that you continue to allow us to fight for what matters most to you. Our achievement in electing economic champions this month could not have happened without you. We look forward to a restful and productive holiday season, and we hope you’ll join us to advocate for and pass a PDAB in Virginia in the New Year!
Thank you and Happy Thanksgiving

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
This Thanksgiving, I am full of gratitude for so many blessings. And I want to take a moment to let you know that you are one of them. Since 2017, I have had the privilege of working with so many people who are committed to serving our country and making our world a better place. How lucky I am. How inspired I am. How grateful I am.
Support Lizzie Fletcher [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/6ffd128b-4e03-4573-aa56-f914f45e9df1.gif]
Today, I am thankful for family, friends, and supporters, near and far, who have made possible the opportunity for me to serve our community and our country in Congress. I am thankful to the people of TX-07, who have entrusted me with the privilege of being their voice. And I am thankful to you for helping make it possible.
What we have already accomplished together reminds us of all we can accomplish, and 2023 has reminded us how important it is that we do so. As we look ahead to 2024 and all that is at stake, I am hopeful and I am grateful for those who I know will continue to do the work of defending democracy, ensuring equality, and restoring our rights together.
This Thanksgiving Day, and every day, I am grateful for your support, your time, and your belief in what we can accomplish together. It is with that in mind and gratitude in my heart that I wish you and your loved ones a wonderful day of Thanksgiving.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Sign-off [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS

name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy Thanksgiving!

This special time of year allows us to take a step back from our busy schedules and reflect on all of our blessings. It also gives us the opportunity to spend time with family and reflect on the joy and support they add to our lives every day. I am grateful for the opportunity to spend the day with my wife and three children along with other family, and I hope you’re able to enjoy time with your loved ones as well.

I’m also grateful for the friendship and support you’ve provided me over the years. May you and your family have a wonderful and safe Thanksgiving!

Raja

Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress

Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

name: Gabe Amo
subject: A Thanksgiving Wish From Gabe Amo
body:
This year is a very special Thanksgiving for me — I have a lot more to be thankful for than usual. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73856845/439863564/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkzYzJlMmYtMTE4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ntD9JcyxtTLPhj8l28G5H-NZH6s9XRSKH066WVXNX24=&emci=3391e2c7-5e89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=593c2e2f-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=12466492)

| | Dear Friend,This year is a very special Thanksgiving for me — I have a lot more to be thankful for than usual. Because of your support, I have the privilege of serving in the U.S. House of Representatives for the people in the place I love most in the world: Rhode Island. At this time of reflection, I am grateful for so many people who make my story — and our Rhode Island story — possible. From service members who ensure our freedom to small businesses who form the backbone of our economy to caregivers of all forms, we are built of the hard work and resilience that makes us all stronger. It has been a whirlwind opening our Pawtucket and Washington, D.C. offices, participating in [local](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73856846/439863565/-383723986?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkzYzJlMmYtMTE4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ntD9JcyxtTLPhj8l28G5H-NZH6s9XRSKH066WVXNX24=&emci=3391e2c7-5e89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=593c2e2f-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=12466492) and [national](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73856847/439863566/-1270298821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkzYzJlMmYtMTE4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ntD9JcyxtTLPhj8l28G5H-NZH6s9XRSKH066WVXNX24=&emci=3391e2c7-5e89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=593c2e2f-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=12466492) news [interviews](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73856848/439863567/-992893989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkzYzJlMmYtMTE4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ntD9JcyxtTLPhj8l28G5H-NZH6s9XRSKH066WVXNX24=&emci=3391e2c7-5e89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=593c2e2f-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=12466492), and hitting the ground running on addressing our District’s priorities. I am heartened by the words of encouragement that so many have shared. So, thank you. I am so excited to work for you. I wish you and your families a wonderful Thanksgiving!With gratitude,Gabe
---

clean_body: This year is a very special Thanksgiving for me — I have a lot more to be thankful for than usual. | | | | | Dear Friend,This year is a very special Thanksgiving for me — I have a lot more to be thankful for than usual. Because of your support, I have the privilege of serving in the U.S. House of Representatives for the people in the place I love most in the world: Rhode Island. At this time of reflection, I am grateful for so many people who make my story — and our Rhode Island story — possible. From service members who ensure our freedom to small businesses who form the backbone of our economy to caregivers of all forms, we are built of the hard work and resilience that makes us all stronger. It has been a whirlwind opening our Pawtucket and Washington, D.C. offices, participating in and news , and hitting the ground running on addressing our District’s priorities. I am heartened by the words of encouragement that so many have shared. So, thank you. I am so excited to work for you. I wish you and your families a wonderful Thanksgiving!With gratitude,Gabe | | = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: A note of gratitude
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73857318/439865529/-1940790846?refcode=AU_TNDP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZmN2M5YS0xMThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIFy-dsmb_vybjO2PcpVqp8ZtVNozs1iAHQ3k3Vqm6Q=)
---
Peter — I hope you’re enjoying today with the ones you love most, full of warmth. Before I head out and spend the day with my family, I wanted to make sure I sent along this note. I can’t thank each and every one of you enough for your support. I’m truly grateful that I get to wake up each morning and connect with everyday Tennesseans in communities from Memphis to Mountain City. We can’t do this work without grassroots support, and every person on this journey with us is vital as we look to break up this supermajority and empower Democrats in every community. **So thank you, Peter — whether you’ve knocked on doors with our team, pitched in a dollar or two here and there, came out and joined us at an event, or even read emails like this, I can speak for our entire team when I say we are thankful and grateful that you’re in this with us.** I hope you have a safe and happy Thanksgiving, Peter. — Hendrell Remus Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73857319/439865530/1459024394?refcode=AU_TNDP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZmN2M5YS0xMThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIFy-dsmb_vybjO2PcpVqp8ZtVNozs1iAHQ3k3Vqm6Q=) | [PITCH IN TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73857320/439865531/1459024394?refcode=AU_TNDP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231123_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZmN2M5YS0xMThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIFy-dsmb_vybjO2PcpVqp8ZtVNozs1iAHQ3k3Vqm6Q=)

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
Peter, As we gather with our families to celebrate Thanksgiving, it’s a time to reflect on what truly matters. In the midst o
|
---
| Peter, As we gather with our families to celebrate Thanksgiving, it’s a time to reflect on what truly matters. In the midst of a world that often seems upside down, we have much to be thankful for – our families, our freedoms, and our great nation.
---
|
---
**This year, I am especially thankful for the growing family of the Common Sense Club, which includes amazing individuals like yourself.** Together, we’ve stood strong against the tide of radical agendas and have championed the values that make America exceptional.
---
| Our collective voice is a beacon of hope in a sea of chaos, advocating for the hardworking middle class, supporting our law enforcement heroes, and pushing back against out-of-control spending that threatens our future.
Thanksgiving is more than just a feast; it's a heartfelt reminder of our rich heritage and the enduring principles upon which our nation was built. It’s a day to remember that despite our differences, we are all part of a larger American family, united in our pursuit of liberty, justice, and prosperity for everyone. This holiday, I encourage you to extend the hand of fellowship. Whether it's volunteering, helping a neighbor, or simply sharing a kind word, these acts of kindness embody the true essence of Thanksgiving. As we gather with our families and friends, let's remember those less fortunate. A small gesture can make a big difference in someone's life. It's these moments of compassion and generosity that weave the fabric of our community. Thank you for being a part of our journey. Your support and shared belief in our cause have been a beacon of hope. As we move forward, let’s carry the spirit of Thanksgiving into our daily lives, fostering a community that upholds the values we cherish. **Wishing you a Thanksgiving filled with peace, joy, and heartfelt moments.** Warmest regards, Bill
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/15637200/a8a7eeaa18f58ca6) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: What I’m grateful for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73857617/439866718/-849459103?refcode=ea.70404cbe-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.70404cbe-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQwNGNiZS0xMThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G-CWXSj4Y120LLyZRyuRf5sFniqcBTyyzHI-k-luCR0=&emci=4efa5341-b388-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=70404cbe-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=46764483)
---
I know we all have celebrations to get to today, so I’ll be quick. It is easy to get lost in the hard things we’ve faced this year. Many of us have lost loved ones — some at the end of long lives and others taken far too soon. There are scary events in the news daily. But when times get tough, I find it’s most important to look for places that we can offer thanks for in our lives. **I’m grateful for my life and all the people in it who bring me so much joy. I’m grateful that I have a voice and that I’m able to use it to make a difference. And, I am grateful for you and this movement we’re building together.** I hope you’re spending time with loved ones today and get to enjoy some yummy food. With thanks, Gloria [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73857618/439866720/-849459103?refcode=ea.70404cbe-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.70404cbe-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQwNGNiZS0xMThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G-CWXSj4Y120LLyZRyuRf5sFniqcBTyyzHI-k-luCR0=&emci=4efa5341-b388-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=70404cbe-118a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=46764483)

clean_body: | I know we all have celebrations to get to today, so I’ll be quick. It is easy to get lost in the hard things we’ve faced this year. Many of us have lost loved ones — some at the end of long lives and others taken far too soon. There are scary events in the news daily. But when times get tough, I find it’s most important to look for places that we can offer thanks for in our lives. I’m grateful for my life and all the people in it who bring me so much joy. I’m grateful that I have a voice and that I’m able to use it to make a difference. And, I am grateful for you and this movement we’re building together. I hope you’re spending time with loved ones today and get to enjoy some yummy food. With thanks, Gloria | Follow along: | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
Fellow American,

I want to take a moment to personally wish you a happy Thanksgiving.

I’m so grateful to be celebrating with my family in the greatest country on
Earth.

Today and every day, we must not take the freedoms we have here for granted.

I am incredibly grateful for you and all you do for our mission. Nothing we
have achieved would be possible without you.

Enjoy this blessed day with your loved ones!

Thank you,

Maria Elvira Salazar

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Happy thanksgiving from us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek, it's John + Gisele.
Before we sit down to eat with August, Karl, and Gracie, we wanted to drop you a quick message to say **_Happy Thanksgiving_**. ❤️
Looking back at the last year and the journey we have been on together, there is so much to be grateful for.
We're thankful that our family is together again, and we're thankful for the excellent mental health care at Walter Reed John got earlier this year. We're grateful for his continued recovery, and for the support of people in PA and across the country, from all sides of the political spectrum, after John bravely went public about his treatment for depression.
And we are so so so grateful for YOU. Every person who is part of this team, who sent us messages of encouragement, or who supports John's work in the Senate fighting for PA families has been an incredible force for good. We are out-of-this-world thankful.
So today, we're wishing yinz + youse a happy, healthy, and safe Thanksgiving -- from our family to yours. 🦃
John + Gisele Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231123-8682-footer&t=1&refcode2=8682_434096_9j5qon&akid=8682%2E434096%2E9j5qon)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8682%2E434096%2E9j5qon)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8682%2E434096%2E9j5qon)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Joe Biden
subject: From the Biden family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Thanksgiving is a special time in America. A time to reflect on what the year has brought, and to think about what lies ahead. | | |
---
Peter, it’s Joe. I wanted to reach out today and talk about why today is so important. Thanksgiving is a special time in America. A time to reflect on what the year has brought, and to think about what lies ahead. These last few years, we’ve made great progress, but we still have a long way to go. While we continue this important work together, we can’t forget the reason for Thanksgiving in the first place -- during tough times, we come together to express our gratitude to those we hold close. And for those who have lost loved ones, I know this time of year is especially difficult. It’s important we keep our loved ones in our hearts this time of year. I will be thinking and praying for each and every one of them at our Thanksgiving table because Jill and I have been there and know how hard today can be. So on this Thanksgiving, let’s be grateful. Scripture says, “Let us rejoice always, pray continually, and give thanks in all circumstances.” And I give thanks now: for you and for the trust you have placed in me. So from the Biden family to yours, wherever and however you may be celebrating, we wish you a Happy Thanksgiving. God bless you, and may God protect our troops. Joe Joe Biden [](joebiden.com?refcode=jb_em_mi_20231123_b1_jb_actives1_rtb_do_c1_na-ac&link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-my-word-as-a-biden-6&email_referrer=email_2121490&email_subject=from-the-biden-family-to-yours-happy-thanksgiving)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you so much for being a supporter of President Biden and Vice President Harris. But Peter, we don’t want to bother you. clean_body: Thanksgiving is a special time in America. A time to reflect on what the year has brought, and to think about what lies ahead. | | | Peter, it’s Joe. I wanted to reach out today and talk about why today is so important. Thanksgiving is a special time in America. A time to reflect on what the year has brought, and to think about what lies ahead. These last few years, we’ve made great progress, but we still have a long way to go. While we continue this important work together, we can’t forget the reason for Thanksgiving in the first place -- during tough times, we come together to express our gratitude to those we hold close. And for those who have lost loved ones, I know this time of year is especially difficult. It’s important we keep our loved ones in our hearts this time of year. I will be thinking and praying for each and every one of them at our Thanksgiving table because Jill and I have been there and know how hard today can be. So on this Thanksgiving, let’s be grateful. Scripture says, “Let us rejoice always, pray continually, and give thanks in all circumstances.” And I give thanks now: for you and for the trust you have placed in me. So from the Biden family to yours, wherever and however you may be celebrating, we wish you a Happy Thanksgiving. God bless you, and may God protect our troops. Joe Joe Biden joebiden.com?refcode=jbemmi20231123b1jbactives1rtbdoc1na-ac&linkid=1&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-my-word-as-a-biden-6&emailreferrer=email2121490&emailsubject=from-the-biden-family-to-yours-happy-thanksgiving

It's been a challenging couple of years for our nation, but your support has sustained incredible progress in our effort to protect our democracy and the integrity of our elections process.

YOU are making our work possible with your generous support and commitment to our shared values. Please know how grateful we are to have you on our side.

To all who celebrate: have a very happy Thanksgiving!

Sean

subject: Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | |
---
| | Happy Thanksgiving Freedom Fighters,

As you may know, President Abraham Lincoln issued America’s first [_Proclamation of Thanksgiving_](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6ca2a3a3d5&e=a7ab36849c). In Lincoln’s proclamation he asked Americans to observe a national day of thanks for the freedom this country offers with “one heart and one voice by the whole American people.”

I hope you and your family are blessed with good health, hope, joy, peace and love. Have a wonderful Thanksgiving!

Best,
---

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
---
From my family to yours, I want to take a moment to wish you a happy Thanksgiving.

We have so much to be thankful for this year, Peter.

Today, we get to celebrate with our loved ones in the greatest country on Earth.

I am so grateful for all your support this year, and I can’t wait to get to work in 2024.
---
In Service,
---
---
Col. Mike Waltz
Special Forces Green Beret
U.S. Congressman (FL-6)

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
Happy Thanksgiving! It’s been a busy, at times chaotic, year so I hope that today we can all take a moment to rest, spend time with loved ones, and reflect on everything for which we are grateful.

This year, I am especially thankful for the support of folks like you. Thanks to your dedication and tenacity, we’re building a movement to bring our community together and defend our core values. I know that together, we have many more milestones ahead.

I’m also immensely grateful to spend this holiday with my wife and daughters, who are the driving force behind everything I do.

From all of us in the Coplen family, please accept our best wishes to you and yours for a safe and peaceful Thanksgiving holiday!

Thanks,
Rick

It’s been a busy, at times chaotic, year so I hope that today we can all take a moment to rest, spend time with loved ones, and reflect on everything for which we are grateful. This year, I am especially thankful for the support of folks like you. Thanks to your dedication and tenacity, we’re building a movement to bring our community together and defend our core values. I know that together, we have many more milestones ahead. I’m also immensely grateful to spend this holiday with my wife and daughters, who are the driving force behind everything I do. From all of us in the Coplen family, please accept our best wishes to you and yours for a safe and peaceful Thanksgiving holiday! Thanks, Rick | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

name: Wendy
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
|
---
Dear Friends,

As we approach the Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude to you, my incredible supporters, who are the driving force behind my campaign to represent our conservative values in Congress.

This Thanksgiving, I am immensely grateful for the unwavering support and enthusiasm from individuals like you who believe in the vision we share for a brighter future for our community.

Your dedication, whether through volunteering, spreading the word, or contributing to our campaign, has been nothing short of inspiring. Together, we are building a movement that is rooted in the conservative values we hold dear.

As we gather with our loved ones to celebrate the spirit of gratitude, let us also celebrate the collective strength we have built. Your belief in our shared mission fuels my determination to represent our conservative values in Congress and work tirelessly on your behalf.

I am truly thankful for the opportunity to serve and represent the incredible people of Indiana's 3rd district. Our journey is just beginning, and with your continued support, I am confident that we can create positive change together.

Wishing you and your loved ones a joyous Thanksgiving filled with warmth, love, and the company of those who matter most.

With heartfelt thanks,

Wendy Davis

| Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

---

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Wishing you a warm and happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team,

I hope you’re enjoying a warm and joyful Thanksgiving with your family, friends, and loved ones.

As we take time to reflect today, I’d like to take a moment to tell you how enormously grateful I am every day for your continued support.

Your words, your time, and your energy are what propel this campaign and inspire our movement for a better future for the people of NY-17, this nation, and the world.

Have a safe and happy Thanksgiving.

Yours,

Mondaire

name: Wes Moore
subject: From my family to yours
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73863398/439885895/1666406465?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDNjMWQ2ZC0xOThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5zGdSl1qc2Jkh9aWSkt7hr4PQGD7uTBV_xqWVwFlOf8=)
Friend, Happy Thanksgiving! If you’re like me, you’re probably getting excited to eat — especially if you did a Turkey Trot this morning. We’re cooking together as a family today, and I can’t wait to sit down and enjoy the food and each other. But before we dig in, I wanted to reach out personally to say: **thank you.** Together, we’re building a movement to make Maryland a state where every single person and family can thrive. On this holiday, I want to deeply express my sincere gratitude toward every single one of you who played a part in electing me last year. I’ve been deeply humbled by the support you’ve shown me, and I am honored to have spent the last year working to better the lives of all the families across Maryland who are gathering together today. From my and Dawn’s family to yours, happy day of gratitude. Elevate, Wes
---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Apoorva and I want to personally wish you and your family a happy and blessed Thanksgiving!
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=b39a330ce09c419ebf423e068cf3812c&_t=oh5BFLS18N3FtZ3AQpsAOs63Qat2fXY5IKTZN9y4KvOfISnUfM0TI3NFMEesRIGgWzwDeyYPIFgm5NLG_yingZe6q_N46aCS5knhR5pVe4E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=b39a330ce09c419ebf423e068cf3812c&_t=oh5BFLS18N3FtZ3AQpsAOs63Qat2fXY5IKTZN9y4KvOfISnUfM0TI3NFMEesRIGgWzwDeyYPIFgm5NLG_yingZe6q_N46aCS5knhR5pVe4E%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b39a330ce09c419ebf423e068cf3812c&_e=sxrck26o-MjIMg39-S-SnG4J48srl_akotmGGP_0zOXLuyA40jkBEy0iLtuLgyaaPj2T3hymkgPdsE8pFm54KUUX3qn67xD1gPn81nC3qBts1Wih-Nx_g3JUew616rqa5W8mA0lDcvkRTmmq1_wSZi9RGprFPG98EPO71-sMCN-qjYTUlEOxny5dj_ek0YXKGip9UFjB4qoKSgPo3ykr5Q%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

**Apoorva and I want to personally wish you and your family a happy and blessed Thanksgiving!** I have many things to be grateful for and wanted to take a moment to express that.

I am thankful to live in America, a nation founded on the dream of freedom and the values of merit and hard work. A country where free speech is elevated and we can gather with family and friends of all beliefs and give thanks for each other's company.

**I want to especially offer my respect and thanks for our service men and women at home and abroad.** Our appreciation for them should know no bounds and our country owes them a deep debt of gratitude.

**Fellow American, I’m grateful for you and your support.** I am continuously humbled by your support and look forward to continuing to fight for you and your family in putting America First.

**Again, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving and may God bless you, your family, and our nation!**

Happy Thanksgiving,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b39a330ce09c419ebf423e068cf3812c&_e=sxrck26o-MjIMg39-S-SnG4J48srl_akotmGGP_0zOXLuyA40jkBEy0iLtuLgyaaiEeMXkTxQ1glF_b-W5HoBwZK-oZqvht-nlHm0jkZDSyE06ikVabuvfKeqHVEw3JA8TkTZze1TMCJe6S0ATMVs0rFp21hVSlo29bUHSkeEn7PmXbyJzBggEb8Z-6cFl08V_rZZ_HSVKEuARc8JXF0fQ%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** | Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b39a330ce09c419ebf423e068cf3812c&_e=sxrck26o-MjIMg39-S-SnG4J48srl_akotmGGP_0zOXLuyA40jkBEy0iLtuLgyaaXwTqOG1AZ-8UR-5Pv9WC9L8W5nKsRaOrv0gFQKL4qDG7UJmgC7ga6BOd32XxQyzaULjojxfusFnff2m2HLc6iUwxHf7hzhumbPXxL4LhQ0zEnNZ_hiZvcZyJbDUuBkVDZ_2t_O8jw0ot-Wn5BeAAKw%3D%3D)
