name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I'm thankful for you
| | |
---
Friend,
Happy Thanksgiving! I hope that you're celebrating the holiday with loved ones, joyous festivities, and _plenty_ of good food. **Before I sit down for dinner with my family, I wanted to reach out to personally express my gratitude for you.**
When I announced my Senate campaign just a few months ago, I never could have imagined the incredible outpouring of support from people like you all across our country. I am humbled and inspired that so many of you have chosen to invest in this movement, believe in my campaign, and fight for a better future for our beloved state and our beautiful country.
As I hear from supporters like you and talk to voters across our state, I've never been more certain: _**2024 will be the year that we flip Florida blue.**_
The enthusiasm and energy on the ground here is simply electric. Floridians are done with the extremism, the partisanship, the hatred, and the lies from Rick Scott. They're ready for real leadership that will fight to protect opportunities, bring communities together, and uplift every single family across our great state. **This campaign has what it takes to win. I feel it in my bones. And I am so, so grateful that you're a part of it.**
None of this would have been possible without early supporters like you stepping up, chipping in, and believing in a better future, and better leadership, for Florida. Together, we can — and will — win the change that we seek.

So from the bottom of my heart, thank you. And happy Thanksgiving.
With the warmest wishes for you and your family,

Debbie
|

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

| Friend, As we gather with loved ones during this Thanksgiving, I wanted to take a moment to extend warm wishes from my family to yours. This year holds a special significance for Susan and I, being the first holiday season following our daughter Emma's wedding and marking the beginning of a new chapter. It's moments like these that remind us of the importance of family and taking time to be together. Beyond the cherished moments within our family, I am deeply thankful for the incredible support and encouragement you've shown me throughout the beginning of this journey. Your unwavering belief in our campaign means the world to me, and for that, I am truly grateful. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with joy, laughter, and warmth. ****_With heartfelt gratitude,
_ _Chuck Morse & Family
_

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=1006&akid=681%2E52803%2ESJqARG ][IMG]

I hope you’re spending your day surrounded by friends and family and
enjoying some delicious food,
Peter, so I’ll try to keep this
quick.

Thanksgiving is special, because it’s a reminder to slow down every once
in a while and take stock of all that we have to be grateful for.

I think it’s especially important when you’re running a grassroots
campaign, because the phrase “I wouldn’t be here without you” is truly an
understatement.

It’s your support – your energy, your enthusiasm, your engagement, and
your giving – that gives me the confidence to make a run for the U.S.
Senate, and know that we can win.

So this Thanksgiving, I’m grateful for my family, my friends, my staff,
and this amazing grassroots team that has supported me from day 1.

Thank you, Peter, and I hope you have a lovely Thanksgiving!

—Angela

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=681%2E52803%2ESJqARG ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=681%2E52803%2ESJqARG ]click here.

subject: Happy Thanksgiving

body:
I’m grateful to all of you who work to make a difference.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73865132/439892017/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTAxMjkzOC0xYzhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GiX3ihUzzhJq-JAtA_w_BUqPAYmC2UxA8-ZxI0C2_2o=&emci=1a5f43cc-6689-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=8a012938-1c8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Quick note before you finish cooking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Can you support No Kid Hungry today?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33609%2E3422442%2EM3k-Dh)
Happy Thanksgiving, Derek!
**Before you head off to finish preparing your turkey or baking a pie,[I’m asking you to consider making a donation to No Kid Hungry.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231123-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_NKH_20231123_V1_F&refcode2=33609_3422442_M3k-Dh&akid=33609%2E3422442%2EM3k-Dh)**
**No Kid Hungry does important work to help make sure kids of all ages have access to nutritious food. Their work is especially critical right now, when 1 in 5 American kids live in hunger.**
**On top of that, Republicans are trying to cut funding for school lunches. I’ve pushed back against their efforts every step of the way, and have introduced legislation to instead expand and strengthen free school meals for kids across the country.**
**Too many American kids will head back to school next Monday without adequate food, and a gift of**$50 can help provide up to 500 meals.[Can you make a donation to No Kid Hungry today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231123-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_NKH_20231123_V1_F&refcode2=33609_3422442_M3k-Dh&akid=33609%2E3422442%2EM3k-Dh)****
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231123-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_NKH_20231123_V1_F&refcode2=33609_3422442_M3k-Dh&akid=33609%2E3422442%2EM3k-Dh)
Thanks for considering, and enjoy your Thanksgiving!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_NKH_20231123_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33609_3422442_M3k-Dh&akid=33609%2E3422442%2EM3k-Dh)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=33609%2E3422442%2EM3k-Dh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=33609%2E3422442%2EM3k-Dh)

Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

name: Bill Cassidy, M.D.
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Louisiana!
body:
| | | | From my family to yours...
---
---
---
Friend,
As we gather with family and friends today, let us take a moment to count our blessings and give thanks as Americans and Louisianans.
---
---
---
---
As Americans, let us remember the men and women who have made the ultimate sacrifice so that we may be free.
As Louisianans, let us give thanks for the broad array of cultures that bind us together and make our state a melting pot of unmatched flavor, rhythm, and tradition.
From my family to yours, with love and gratitude – Happy Thanksgiving!
---
---
| |
---
Bill Cassidy, M.D.
United States Senator, Louisiana

---
---
---
**P.S. – And an extra special thanks to the fine folks who make the delicious Cajun Injector we use in our turkeys every year!**
---
---
---
Bill Cassidy, M.D.
PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA

name: Hill Harper
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from your Team Hill family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
I hope your day tomorrow is filled with rest, good food, loved ones, and community.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231123&t=1&akid=615%2E62735%2El1OBLq)
Happy Thanksgiving, Peter! 🦃🥧🍂🤎
I’m sending this message a day early because I want to make sure I’m not blowing up your phone tomorrow when you’re spending time with your loved ones.
Whether you’re team breadcrumbs on the mac and cheese, team marshmallows on the sweet potatoes, a star in the kitchen, or whether your only job is to watch football from the couch, we can all agree on one thing: **this holiday is all about gratitude and community.**
That’s why I wanted to take time today to tell you just how grateful Team Hill is for your support. You push us to do better, and your support, whether monetary or engagement-based, enables us to strive for more.
**This is just the start!**
I hope you enjoy all your traditions on this day and have some time to unplug, relax, and sit in gratitude.
Cheers,
Hill 💙
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231123&t=2&refcode2=615_62735_l1OBLq&akid=615%2E62735%2El1OBLq)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=615%2E62735%2El1OBLq)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=615%2E62735%2El1OBLq)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=111823 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=111823]
Friend,
I’m taking a moment from my family to reflect on the past year and all that I have to be thankful for. 2023 was a whirlwind year filled with legislative victories. From protecting reproductive freedoms and universal school meals, to investing in Minnesota’s infrastructure and passing paid family and medical leave, there is so much to be grateful for.
None of that would have been possible without you, friend. Thank you for your engagement, your passion, and your support of the Minnesota House DFL.
From my family to yours, I wish you a safe and happy Thanksgiving!
Thank you,
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives

subject: Thankful for you.
body:
We’re wishing you a happy and peaceful Thanksgiving. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73866848/439897407/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxOTY4ZGFjLTIwOGEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ezpfEaTcTU6MgSgjuM-FHI_KLVO-1i7OAZq5oFss4kY=) | Peter, Whether you’re celebrating with family today, gathering with friends, traveling for work, stationed overseas, or observing the holiday on your own, the Blue Dogs wish you a happy and peaceful Thanksgiving. And if we’re going around the table saying something we’re thankful for — it’s you! Our constituents, voters, and grassroots supporters mean the world to us, and we’re thankful to have you on our side as we work to make Congress sound and act more like the people they’re supposed to represent. Thank you for everything you do, and have a Happy Thanksgiving! – The Blue Dogs
---

name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
|
---
Dear Friends, The Thanksgiving holiday is one of my favorite days of the year. We are blessed this year to have many members of the Grassley family gathering together around the table at the farm for our family feast. I hope you, your family, and all of your loved ones can celebrate all the things you have to be thankful for in life. It's important to take a moment and cherish your time together. Barbara and I have so much to be thankful for, and we count our blessings for another year of continued good health and a bountiful harvest here in New Hartford. We count our supporters among our greatest blessings as we look to the year ahead. I'm working as hard as ever so that we may pass on our cherished blessings of freedom to our children and grandchildren. Barbara and I wish you and your family a blessed Thanksgiving holiday. Thank you for all you do, Chuck Grassley _P.S. Thanksgiving Day only comes around once a year. So, don 't skip dessert. I'm saving room for an extra scoop of vanilla ice cream and a piece of Barbara's pecan pie!_ | Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.
---

Fellow Patriot,
Thanksgiving is right around the corner - and I want to take a moment to show my appreciation for your generosity and support.
My team and I are grateful to serve the great state of Florida. It is my passion and privilege to fight for our freedom. Now, let’s take a moment to appreciate how far we have come.
Have a safe and wonderful Thanksgiving with your loved ones.
---

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | I am thankful for YOU | Fellow Patriot, Thanksgiving is right around the corner - and I want to take a moment to show my appreciation for your generosity and support. My team and I are grateful to serve the great state of Florida. It is my passion and privilege to fight for our freedom. Now, let’s take a moment to appreciate how far we have come. Have a safe and wonderful Thanksgiving with your loved ones. Thank you, | | Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- =

Peter,
Happy Thanksgiving! I want to take the opportunity to express my gratitude for your support.
It’s been an honor to serve as your voice in Washington and fight along side of you to ensure America remains a beacon of hope, opportunity, and freedom.
Thanksgiving is the perfect time to reflect on our many blessings — family, community, and country among them. I am blessed to have a loving family, represent a wonderful community, and serve the greatest nation on earth.
May we always be thankful and may God continue to bless the United States of America.
Please, enjoy a restful and peaceful Thanksgiving with your loved ones.

clean_body: | | | | I am thankful for you | Peter, Happy Thanksgiving! I want to take the opportunity to express my gratitude for your support. It’s been an honor to serve as your voice in Washington and fight along side of you to ensure America remains a beacon of hope, opportunity, and freedom. Thanksgiving is the perfect time to reflect on our many blessings — family, community, and country among them. I am blessed to have a loving family, represent a wonderful community, and serve the greatest nation on earth. May we always be thankful and may God continue to bless the United States of America. Please, enjoy a restful and peaceful Thanksgiving with your loved ones. | | Thank you, Mike Lawler Congressman, NY-17 | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f1aea379cf42c89a2e14fe940ea25091459e369e26b8e88afda56b5bfa75c743b63e3a778f48c9e128429ed6050455a76168550345c8c4ea6e75e6f5c42b423e

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f1aea379cf42c89a2e14fe940ea25091459e369e26b8e88afda56b5bfa75c743b63e3a778f48c9e128429ed6050455a76168550345c8c4ea6e75e6f5c42b423e

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
I’m thankful for all the work we’ve done together to move our country forward.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73867307/439899278/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGM2NjVjZi0yMThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bAyyOeCy193uDGa6pPl8TXqvLbxBGsMrEUyTIlqT5P8=&emci=95743ce1-8589-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=2dc665cf-218a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Happy Thanksgiving to you and your loved ones! Today, I'm thinking about how much there is to be thankful for. I'm thankful for living in a country that is a democracy and not an autocracy. I'm thankful we've been using that democracy to achieve some significant wins—from passing an infrastructure bill to rebuild America to making the largest investment ever in tackling climate chaos to passing meaningful public safety legislation to appointing judges who reflect the diversity of our country. None of those things would have happened without all of you raising your voices and sharing your viewpoints to help me push for change in the Senate. I'm thankful for your energy, enthusiasm, and sense of purpose. We'll need that for the fights ahead that will determine the future of our democracy. I know that holidays can be hard, and my heart goes out to those of you for whom today is difficult. And to those of you who spend today at work to keep us safe and healthy, thank you. However you spend Thanksgiving, I hope you are able to connect with the folks who mean the most to you. clean_body: I’m thankful for all the work we’ve done together to move our country forward. | | | | Happy Thanksgiving to you and your loved ones! Today, I'm thinking about how much there is to be thankful for. I'm thankful for living in a country that is a democracy and not an autocracy. I'm thankful we've been using that democracy to achieve some significant wins—from passing an infrastructure bill to rebuild America to making the largest investment ever in tackling climate chaos to passing meaningful public safety legislation to appointing judges who reflect the diversity of our country. None of those things would have happened without all of you raising your voices and sharing your viewpoints to help me push for change in the Senate. I'm thankful for your energy, enthusiasm, and sense of purpose. We'll need that for the fights ahead that will determine the future of our democracy. I know that holidays can be hard, and my heart goes out to those of you for whom today is difficult. And to those of you who spend today at work to keep us safe and healthy, thank you. However you spend Thanksgiving, I hope you are able to connect with the folks who mean the most to you. Onward! name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thanksgiving + parade = pure joy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=840%2E135344%2ExT97AG)

Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours!
I'm of course a bit biased, but I would say that Thanksgiving is really at its best in Michigan. Family. Friends. Football. Fall-themed crockery. Classic American Thanksgiving.
We also get to enjoy our own Thanksgiving day parade in Detroit -- the second oldest in the country, alongside that ‘other’ parade in NYC. My dad used to take us down when he worked at Vernors, and my mom used to volunteer years ago. The parade had a bunch of new floats this year, a massive Turkey Trot 5k race, and the highlight at the end, to the squeals of the children, is Santa.
This year, I took my nieces down to see the festivities, and it was in grand form. Nothing is better than traditions with family, and moments of joy in an otherwise busy world.
So as you gather today and enjoy the food, football, or whatever your traditions may be, don't forget to reflect on the many things we have to be thankful for.
Happy Thanksgiving.
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=840%2E135344%2ExT97AG).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=840%2E135344%2ExT97AG)

subject: Gratitude and Thanksgiving Wishes
body:
Happy Thanksgiving! I want to take a moment to express my gratitude for the wonderful community we share here in West Michigan.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/gratitude-and-thanksgiving-wishes?e=16d812e81c)
Logo

** Happy Thanksgiving!
------------------------------------------------------------

I want to take a moment to express my gratitude for the wonderful community we share here in West Michigan. MI-04 is filled with remarkable individuals, and I am continually inspired by the generosity and resilience of the people here. In the spirit of the season, I want to thank you for being an integral part of this community and for the contributions you make every day.

I wish you and your loved ones a joyous and blessed Thanksgiving. May this season be filled with warmth, laughter, and gratitude.

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
https://www.valhoyle.com/ [https://www.valhoyle.com/]
Peter,

Happy Thanksgiving!

Despite the ongoing events in our nation, I hope you enjoy some quality time with your loved ones.

My husband Stephen and I will gather with our family including our new grandchild. Our first Thanksgiving as grandparents. I can't wait to make more Thanksgiving memories this year, and I wish the same for you.

I’m grateful to represent and serve the hard-working families of Oregon’s 4th Congressional District. And on this Thanksgiving, I extend my gratitude for your unwavering support.

Val

subject: From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving!

Peter.

Wishing you and yours a Happy Thanksgiving today.

It’s easy to observe the world and see everything that’s wrong with it, but today we reflect on how much we truly have to be grateful for.

I’m grateful to live in this land of freedom and opportunity. I’m grateful to God for all He has given to me. I’m grateful for my wife and family.

I’m grateful for the chance I have to fight for the things I believe in, and to you for standing with me.

May God continue to bless you, your loved ones and America.

With gratitude,

Eric Early
Conservative for Senate

| |
# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Exemption DENIED
body:
They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uPydrtt34PAIvyJOtdELWw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQihMP0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLUFGUlcDc3BjQgplX96PX2VzOyvZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Fellow American,The radical Left wants you to forget.They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID. They want you to forget that they lied to your face for over a year. They want you to forget that they let extremists riot in the streets while they told you to skip holidays with your loved ones and to “social distance.”They want you to forget how they closed our schools, our businesses, and our houses of worship. (Gavin Newsom even closed Orange County beaches). **And maybe most of all, they want you to forget that thousands of hardworking, competent people either lost their jobs or were forced to take a vaccine they didn’t want.****They want you to forget that...** _...And I hope you never do._ Because if you forget what they did, it’s only a matter of time before they do it again.It’s only a matter of time before they find a new reason to trample your rights and your freedoms for the so-called “greater good.”We can’t forget what the radical Left and its draconian policies did to us and to our families – and we can’t let them forget it either. **That’s why the Center for American Liberty is still putting their feet to the fire and holding them accountable.** But nothing we do is possible without the generosity of patriots like you. **[**Will you give us the funds we need to win this landmark case and make the Left pay for what it did?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uPydrtt34PAIvyJOtdELWw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQihMP0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLUFGUlcDc3BjQgplX96PX2VzOyvZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** We filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID-19 vaccine.And if we can win this critical lawsuit, we can put employers across the country on notice ahead of what some are calling a COVID resurgence.Dovid was the assistant concertmaster and first violinist, while Chris and Rachel both played the French Horn.They are some of the most talented musicians in the country in highly coveted and competitive positions._Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade._ When the Symphony introduced its vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris and Rachel each hold sincere religious beliefs that prohibit them from taking the COVID vaccine.They all filed for religious exemptions and were willing to take other measures, like regularly testing, to prove they didn’t have COVID.But shortly after submitting their requestions for religious exemptions, the Symphony rejected their requests and put them on UNPAID LEAVE.These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish.**It doesn’t matter who you are or what you believe – the radical Left doesn’t respect your right to practice your faith as you see fit.** In their eyes, your body doesn’t belong to you – it belongs to them.I’m deciding to take a stand – and I hope you will too. **[**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty to fund this lawsuit for religious freedom and set a precedent nationwide that puts these radicals on notice.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uPydrtt34PAIvyJOtdELWw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQihMP0SXaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyM19CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLUFGUlcDc3BjQgplX96PX2VzOyvZUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Even after lifting its vaccine mandate, the Symphony refused to give these musicians their jobs back.Because it was never about “science” or “health” – it was always about control.I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---
|

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Food is a basic human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re excited to be directing our support and holiday donations to Food Lifeline, and their work to end hunger in our communities.
#
Hey Peter, it's Pramila!
I hope you are able to take a moment to spend time with friends, family, and loved ones this holiday season.
Here at Team Pramila HQ, we’re excited to be directing our support and holiday donations to Food Lifeline, and their work to end hunger in our communities.
**It’s time to show everyone the true power of our grassroots movement this holiday season.[Chip in today to support Food Lifeline and their on-the-ground work to heal and feed our communities.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47657?refcode=em20231123-3199&t=1&akid=3199%2E420207%2ErTGezl)**
[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47657?refcode=em20231123-3199&t=2&akid=3199%2E420207%2ErTGezl)
**Food is a basic human right and nobody should go hungry.**
Food Lifeline provides meals to 1.37 million people experiencing food insecurity and hunger. By distributing food through a network of over 350 food banks, shelters, and meal programs, **they are able to provide an equivalent of more than 282,000 meals a day.**
But their work doesn’t stop there, Peter. Through advocacy and on-the-ground organizing, they have worked to shape local, state, and federal policy by partnering with community-based programs and services.
**[Donate to Food Lifeline today to support our collective work to end hunger in our communities.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47657?refcode=em20231123-3199&t=3&akid=3199%2E420207%2ErTGezl)** Together, we can advance a broad social movement to end hunger this holiday season.
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231123-3199-footer&t=4&refcode2=3199_420207_rTGezl&akid=3199%2E420207%2ErTGezl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Have a wonderful, happy and safe holiday!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73875377/439910315/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMyNTNiYjQtMjk4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oEKIKObAnCmpeKrxRkhHKgdm9pT5Onk9GG13CeOgt7o=)
---
Hello, Friend— This is Tamie—and I just want to thank you for all of your support and wish you a happy Thanksgiving! Thanksgiving is one of my favorite holidays. I love cooking for my family and sitting and talking with everyone. It’s such a special time of year to me. This year I am even more grateful. For starters, I am lucky to still have both of my parents. My dad is in his 83 and still works 7 days a week, so if you wonder where I get my work ethic from it’s him. I’m especially thankful to still have my mom. As some of you know she has cancer, but she’s a strong woman, so she’s still hangin in there. I’m also grateful for my brother and sister. They are so supportive and amazing, there aren’t enough words to express how I feel about them. And of course my son, Anthony. He has been a complete blessing ever since I found out I was pregnant with him. He’s a man now, so it’s interesting to watch him find his way in the world. **And then there’s you, my supporters. **You keep me full of strength in ways you don’t even know. **I am so fired up and ready to go, you have no idea! Thank you** for supporting me since we launched this campaign to defeat Jim Jordan. And, thank you for **giving your time, effort, and financial contributions** to this grassroots effort to flip this district. We can do so much better, and I bring that positive message to the voters and residents of my district everyday, encouraging them to fight for change! Now, we are just under a year away from Election Day and I’m more confident than ever about our chances to flip this seat because of the surge of support from you and so many others. You are awesome! Wishing you and yours a happy and healthy Thanksgiving. In Gratitude, _Tamie _
---

Hello, Friend—
This is Tamie—and I just want to thank you for all of your support and wish you a happy Thanksgiving!
Thanksgiving is one of my favorite holidays. I love cooking for my family and sitting and talking with everyone. It’s such a special time of year to me.
This year I am even more grateful. For starters, I am lucky to still have both of my parents. My dad is in his 83 and still works 7 days a week, so if you wonder where I get my work ethic from it’s him. I’m especially thankful to still have my mom. As some of you know she has cancer, but she’s a strong woman, so she’s still hangin in there. I’m also grateful for my brother and sister. They are so supportive and amazing, there aren’t enough words to express how I feel about them. And of course my son, Anthony. He has been a complete blessing ever since I found out I was pregnant with him. He’s a man now, so it’s interesting to watch him find his way in the world. **
****And then there’s you, my supporters.** You keep me full of strength in ways you don’t even know. **I am so fired up and ready to go, you have no idea! Thank you** for supporting me since we launched this campaign to defeat Jim Jordan. And, thank you for **giving your time, effort, and financial contributions** to this grassroots effort to flip this district. We can do so much better, and I bring that positive message to the voters and residents of my district everyday, encouraging them to fight for change!
Now, we are just under a year away from Election Day and I’m more confident than ever about our chances to flip this seat because of the surge of support from you and so many others. You are awesome!
Wishing you and yours a happy and healthy Thanksgiving.
In Gratitude, _
__Tamie_ [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDU2NTY5MTU0ODMxNjY2MDIsXCJyXCI6MTA1NjU3MDEyNTc2MDYxMjI1fSIsInMiOiJlOGUwYTc0YzZhZDIxNWU3In0)

name: Lori Chavez-DeRemer
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
Peter,
---
---
I am grateful for the privilege to serve as your Congresswoman and to work alongside dedicated individuals who share a common goal of creating a brighter future for our state.
Together, we have achieved significant milestones and overcome challenges, and I am confident that our collective efforts will continue to yield positive outcomes for Oregon and America.
Wishing you and your family a joyous and blessed Thanksgiving.
May your hearts be filled with gratitude, and may the coming year bring prosperity, good health, and continued moments of shared happiness.
Warmest regards,
---
---
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
---

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I am grateful for the privilege to serve as your Congresswoman and to work alongside dedicated individuals who share a common goal of creating a brighter future for our state. Together, we have achieved significant milestones and overcome challenges, and I am confident that our collective efforts will continue to yield positive outcomes for Oregon and America. Wishing you and your family a joyous and blessed Thanksgiving. May your hearts be filled with gratitude, and may the coming year bring prosperity, good health, and continued moments of shared happiness. Warmest regards, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium--Thanksgiving: "A Republic if You Can Keep It"e
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend Tomorrow night two of my younger associates will be presenting the Thanksgiving proclamations of two great American presidents, both of whom were assassinated by assets of the British Empire; Abraham Lincoln and John F. Kennedy. In these trying times, where reason and moderation have disappeared, to be replaced by lawlessness and bloodshed in Gaza, Cameroon, Ukraine, Haiti and elsewhere it can be challenging to think of what we should be thankful for. Is it right to be thankful for the roof over our own heads, when so many lack shelter, or for the food on our tables when so many are starving? Is that humilty or is it selfish small-mindedness? Both Lincoln and Kennedy answered that question in their Thanksgiving Proclamations -- Kennedy wouldn't live to see the day for which his profound text was dedicated. I would like to share something from an important thinker whose work shaped the conception of our new republic, and who had a great influence on the mind of a young Lyndon Larouche, namely Gottfried Wilelhm Leibniz. I quote below from the Preface of his 1710 "Theodicy." "One directs all one's intentions to the common good, which is no other than the glory of God. Thus one finds that there is no greater individual interest than to espouse that of the community, and one gains satisfaction for oneself by taking pleasure in the acquisition of true benefits for men....When we are in this state of mind, we are not disheartened by ill success, we regret only our faults; and the ungrateful ways of men cause no relaxation in the exercise of our kindly disposition. Our charity is humble and full of moderation, it presumes not to domineer; attentive alike to our own faults and to the talents of others, we are inclined to criticize our own actions, and vindicate those of others. We must work out our own perfection and do no wrong to man. There is no piety where there is not charity; and without being kindly and beneficent one cannot show sincere religion." I am thankful to be a citizen of the United States, which was founded on that principle, even though the actions of our nation have not reflected it for many decades, and even then, imperfectly. Each of us has the gift of free will, and with it the power to change the course of history for the greater good of all. Therefore, let us be thankful that the dangers we face are not insurmountable, if we mobilize ourselves to defeat them.
### [NY Symposium, Friday, November 24, 8:00 pm: Thanksgiving: "A Republic if You Can Keep It"](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kxzrmsUB-aan9j46LCR85mE&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124_symposium&n=2)
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kxzrmsUB-aan9j46LCR85mE&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124_symposium&n=3) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124_symposium&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231124_symposium&n=4)
---
\--Diane

name: Chrissy
subject: A note of gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Happy Thanksgiving!
| | |
---
Happy Thanksgiving, Derek!

If you’re like me, you’re watching a lot of football (Go Eagles 🦅!), eating a little too much, maybe playing a board game or two, and loving being with family and friends despite the mess. :-)

I’m thankful for so much today, including the friendship and support you’ve shown me over the years. I am grateful for you.
In between the moments of comfort you find today, I hope you’ll join me in performing an act of service – big or small – to those who have faced emergencies or crises this year. [Chester County Food Bank](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73875568/439911192/-1740003681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDgyZWEyYi0yYThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCt8RMBcJ-NQVnDQ-AKMqnWU-ab2yyNMiLeTX8L7pNQ=&emci=d623842a-f087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f482ea2b-2a8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485) and [Helping Harvest in Berks County](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73875570/439911200/1399964338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDgyZWEyYi0yYThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCt8RMBcJ-NQVnDQ-AKMqnWU-ab2yyNMiLeTX8L7pNQ=&emci=d623842a-f087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f482ea2b-2a8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485) are always looking for volunteers to help pack food boxes. It’s a simple activity, but it can mean the world to someone in need.
Additionally, if you know someone in need, [here’s a link to find a food bank near you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73875572/439911202/1116334292?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDgyZWEyYi0yYThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oCt8RMBcJ-NQVnDQ-AKMqnWU-ab2yyNMiLeTX8L7pNQ=&emci=d623842a-f087-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=f482ea2b-2a8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=21278485)

As always, thank you for your compassion and support, and I’m wishing you and yours a safe and happy Thanksgiving.

From my family to yours,
Chrissy
Finally seeing the Macy’s Day parade in person a few years ago...in memory of my grandmother. The Rockettes and the parade were some of my grandmother’s favorite things! 👇

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!

Happy Thanksgiving, Peter! I hope you’re taking this time to celebrate and enjoy time with your family and friends, like I am. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_nnuOwChAIo3p0-VoabdzczBNViC4VqmaFRkdyAztTE3CcjAo37nEuvqOVF2z_fDDWiLwJh7yyRDPBkeQtlbYxNKCYUMaSLSVgXf2-yVOg82maNuxNhYWYJK7m9AwY_G59Jpn9Sf7FSRrA3ctm1Hzm9WhBzTI95OhvoIU5Qp1bmBzkiMGB0Gk_S__giCmol6FqNfo2AjL9ZByCqL4JWSUX1c9ob6B060NqU41d5IwAVqbkrQdVPf1jkfou7xCix8koDTvVm2FBONRC9c_C2mClLY0V2PYMpE9d-dWWDWQlaQ/41j/bkgNjDUeRj2ZGhIsyLdxYw/h1/9J2514TZQjFoqW3Poy9ieLY1kL6JaZBFHjnYrfW1utU) I wanted to take a few moments to share with you some of what I am thankful for this year. First off, I am thankful for the opportunity to fight for my community here in South Texas. You deserve so much better than what you have been getting and I am honored to be able to stand up for you and fight for your rights, freedoms, and your American Dream. Most of all, I am thankful for the support and love of mi familia — that includes YOU, Peter. I am thankful for everything you have poured into this campaign and into me. Your support and belief in a better future for TX-15 means the world to me and I couldn’t be more grateful for that. I hope you enjoy the holiday weekend and that it’s filled with love and joy! I’m excited to be sharing the day with my wife and kids, eating the best Thanksgiving sides, watching football, and enjoying the fall weather. This past year has given us all kinds of challenges, but we made it through, and now it’s time to celebrate with our closest friends and family as the holiday season commences. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Happy Thanksgiving, friend!

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
From our family to yours, happy Thanksgiving, friend!

I can’t thank you enough for everything you’ve done to support Democrats at all levels, and I’m grateful to have you in the fight going forward.

Whether you’re with immediate family today or on your own this year, I’m wishing you health, safety, and comfort. The holiday season might be difficult for many this year, but together we will get through it.

Thank you and happy Thanksgiving,

— Eric Swalwell

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With you by my side in the year to come, I’m confident that we will not only win this Senate race, but elect the Democratic majorities up and down the ballot to kickstart this amazing progress and continue pressing forward — to build an economy that truly works for everyone, to save our planet, and to ensure that nearly 250 years into this amazing democratic experiment, that we preserve our democracy for the next 250 years.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4553%2E5257348%2E1rJWUG)
Hi Derek, it’s Adam.
I didn’t want to let this Thanksgiving go by without thanking you personally for everything — whether you’ve donated to my campaign or just like to stay up to date by reading my emails.
This year has been different than any other in my life. Running for the U.S. Senate in a state as big as California means meeting a lot of people.
I’m grateful for every person I’ve met along the campaign trail. Your stories, your struggles, and your triumphs have made me a better candidate, and I will never stop asking everyone I meet on the campaign trail, _“How can I help?”_
And of course, none of this would be possible without my wonderful family, who have given me their unwavering support (and have even written a few emails!). My wife, Eve, my two amazing children, Lexi and Eli, my brother David, and a loving family support network.
I’m incredibly fortunate to have them — and you, Derek.
While we haven’t seen as much progress in Congress this year — no thanks to the incompetent Republican House majority — we are seeing the fruits of our efforts in the last Congress.
* We’re rebuilding our roads, bridges and tunnels, air and seaports, expanding broadband internet, and refitting pipes to provide clean drinking water across the country thanks to the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act._
* We’re attracting massive investments in clean energy, creating new manufacturing jobs, and reinvigorating our automotive industry with fleets of electric vehicles built in the United States thanks to the _Inflation Reduction Act._
* We’re investing in the technology of the future and building our economy for the 21st century with the _CHIPS and Science Act._

And with you by my side in the year to come, I’m confident that we will not only win this Senate race, but elect the Democratic majorities up and down the ballot to continue this amazing progress and press forward — to build an economy that truly works for everyone, to enshrine abortion access into the law, to save our planet, and to ensure that nearly 250 years into this amazing democratic experiment, that we preserve our democracy for the next 250 years.
Thanks for reading — Happy Thanksgiving.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20231123_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4553%2E5257348%2E1rJWUG)
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=4553%2E5257348%2E1rJWUG) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=4553%2E5257348%2E1rJWUG)**

My wife, Eve, my two amazing children, Lexi and Eli, my brother David, and a loving family support network. I’m incredibly fortunate to have them — and you, Derek. While we haven’t seen as much progress in Congress this year — no thanks to the incompetent Republican House majority — we are seeing the fruits of our efforts in the last Congress. We’re rebuilding our roads, bridges and tunnels, air and seaports, expanding broadband internet, and refitting pipes to provide clean drinking water across the country thanks to the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. We’re attracting massive investments in clean energy, creating new manufacturing jobs, and reinvigorating our automotive industry with fleets of electric vehicles built in the United States thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act. We’re investing in the technology of the future and building our economy for the 21st century with the CHIPS and Science Act. And with you by my side in the year to come, I’m confident that we will not only win this Senate race, but elect the Democratic majorities up and down the ballot to continue this amazing progress and press forward — to build an economy that truly works for everyone, to enshrine abortion access into the law, to save our planet, and to ensure that nearly 250 years into this amazing democratic experiment, that we preserve our democracy for the next 250 years. Thanks for reading — Happy Thanksgiving. — Adam 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Squanto's Thanksgiving
body:
Happy Thanksgiving! | | | |
---
| | |
## Native American, Christian and Londoner Tisquantum ("Squanto") and the
First Thanksgiving.
Happy Thanksgiving from the Cox Family to you and your family. One of our family traditions is to listen to the history and stories of the first Thanksgiving.

One key story of the first Thanksgiving is that God turned a tragedy into good for both Squanto and the English settlers. The English lost nearly half of those who arrived on the Mayflower that first deadly winter - nearly all the women bravely died protecting their children! These are the brave women Founders of America.

Squanto, a Patuxet Native American, who was Spanish-baptized and had escaped slavery in Spain by the help of anti-slavery Spanish monks, was at our first Thanksgiving "Harvest Feast" in America. Escaping Spain, he then became an English-speaking, London resident in its financial district working as a freeman for a kind shipbuilder and merchant. But upon return to America, he learned he had literally just lost his entire Patuxet family to a plague. Working through his grief, he then stayed with the Mayflower English settlers at Plymouth and taught them how to survive.

After Squanto's help that spring and summer of 1621, fifty-two [English survivors joined with over 90 braves and Squanto that first November 1621 to give thanks to God](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=9c5d8cf128&e=5bb5efcda7) for the crops, fishing and food gathered which would prevent starvation that second winter. They feasted for three days on turkey, venison, fish, waterfowl, cornbread and more. They played games together, shot guns and bows, and target-practiced with competitions, and they hunted and fished. It was a true and demonstrable peace with great kindness and respect.

You can listen to Squanto's story online [here](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=eb4627e997&e=5bb5efcda7) and read a short synopsis by Charles Colson [here](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=129a5af8a8&e=5bb5efcda7).

Especially today we as Americans and Marylanders thank God for all of His blessings to us and our posterity. This day was first proclaimed to be remembered by Americans in Thanksgiving to God in 1789 [by President George Washington](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e336154fc1&e=5bb5efcda7) "That we may then all unite in rendering unto him our sincere and humble thanks - for his kind care and protection of the People of this Country...", and has since been made our national and State holiday.

Happy Thanksgiving!

---
|
---

name: Jerry Evans
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
From my family to yours, we want to wish you a Happy Thanksgiving. The holiday season is now upon us, which means we are blessed to be spending more time with friends and loved ones. Enjoy these moments and take time for yourself to relax and recharge.
There is so much to be thankful for. I am thankful to God for my family, my friends, and our great country.
---
|
---
| As you gather with family, keep in your prayers those who cannot celebrate or know peace this Thanksgiving. The holidays can be an especially difficult time for families who have lost loved ones in the past year.
Lastly, let's remember and be grateful for our brave men and women protecting us overseas. I know they too would love to be home with their families but instead sacrifice to defend our country and keep us safe.
Happy Thanksgiving,
Jerry Evans
---
---

subject: My dad is getting ready to put the pies in the oven
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃🦃

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73877321/439917985/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODA3N2EtMzA4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DALaIH9vMlvtrjBB_7vF_CuADsbr3nw-qZldAhPzAQo=) Hi! It’s Belle, Andrei’s daughter.

I’m reaching out today because my dad is busy with me and my brother making pies (plural), but I wanted to tell you what I’m thankful for this year – _other than Taylor Swift’s 1989 (Taylor’s Version)._

I’m thankful that my dad cooks dinner for us most nights – and it usually tastes good! (On Thanksgiving, my dad is in charge of the pies, and my mom does the turkey and everything else.) He’s always been a dad who would rather stay at home to watch a movie with us than go to a fancy dinner.

I have spent a good amount of time (13 years) with my dad, so I think I’m qualified to say it’s pretty cool he’s running for Congress. When I first talked about the idea with him, I felt very proud of him for wanting to help make things better and make our country a better place.

**So this year, I’m also thankful to be (along with my brother) the most important part of my dad’s campaign – the reason he’s running.** I've gotten to go door to door with him and to hear him speak at events, and when I hear him talk about the future he’s fighting for, I know it’s for me and my generation.

[**You might be busy today with your own Thanksgiving plans – even if you’re not making as many pies as my dad and us – but if you have a few minutes to spare, will you chip in to my dad’s campaign for Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73877322/439917986/-1883818185?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.23_b1_bc_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODA3N2EtMzA4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DALaIH9vMlvtrjBB_7vF_CuADsbr3nw-qZldAhPzAQo=) | [🦃 DONATE 🦃](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73877323/439917987/-1883818185?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.23_b1_bc_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODA3N2EtMzA4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DALaIH9vMlvtrjBB_7vF_CuADsbr3nw-qZldAhPzAQo=)

Thank you,

– Belle

To learn more about Andrei, visit [**AndreiForArizona.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73877324/439917988/-651367276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE3ODA3N2EtMzA4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DALaIH9vMlvtrjBB_7vF_CuADsbr3nw-qZldAhPzAQo=&emci=dfbdc3b0-9b89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5178077a-308a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13520922) | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona

DAVID BLACKMON: What Happens In Germany Sadly Doesn’t Stay In Germany

The German government, led by Chancellor Olaf Scholz, seems in near
panic now after a court ruling disallowed a proposed reallocation of €
60 billion (roughly $66 billion) in unused COVID funds for more green
subsidies. Reuters reports Scholz and his ministers reacted by
freezing proposals for new spending on programs to help the country’s
struggling industrial sector.

There’s A Sign The Housing Market May Finally Be Thawing

Applications for mortgages ticked up to a six-week high for the week
ending on Nov. 17 in a sign that the housing market might become more
accessible to average Americans following rising prices and high
mortgage rates, according to the Mortgage Bankers Association (MBA).

---
| CRP Newsletter / Thanksgiving Message
---
Happy Thanksgiving
Those of us at the Constitutional Republic Party would like to extend our heartfelt wishes to you for a Happy Thanksgiving. Thanksgiving is about coming together, something we as American’s need to think about. America was built as a melting pot, people from different backgrounds coming together in the pursuit of opportunity and freedom, that was what bound the people of this country. Anything that runs contrary to these two principles are totally unamerican in our view. Government should never restrict either of these things unless it is to protect them (IE you cannot use your freedom to limit others options by force). We are thankful for a country that was built on opportunity and freedom and at the same time, know we have to continue to fight for it for everyone in this country. Slavery and abuse of the Native Americans was not inline with those principles, we were not perfect, we are still a work in progress, which is why we are needed in the Constitutional Republic Party. We need to fight against regulations that limit our opportunity in small businesses, we need to fight for everyone’s right to live their lives as they see fit and not be forced to conform to another’s world view. We need to fight against our tax dollars going to fund special interests and corporate benefits, after all, are we really free if our hard-earned income to taken for us to benefit them? There was a cartoon during the Obama area, showing the skinny cow, that represented the taxpayers and President Obama coming to milk her for all the special interests. It is funny because it is true, the milker can be any politician of any major party for the most part, they actually see us at the milk cows to be harvested for their special interests, those who keep them in office and in power. They do so by limiting our opportunity and freedoms to benefit them and milking us for the resources to ensure that those “too big to fail” can not. Enjoy today, be thankful for what we have, but know we must continue our fight to ensure that those opportunities and freedoms as there for those who come after us.

name: Katie Britt
subject: Faith, family, country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Happy Thanksgiving to you and your family

<>

Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

This Thanksgiving, I am overwhelmed with gratitude for faith, family, our
freedom, andYOU, Peter.

Without your support, serving the great state of Alabama in the U.S. Senate
would not be possible.

As Colossians 4:2 reminds us, "Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is
God's will for you in Christ Jesus."

As we gather with our families and friends today, let’s give thanks to God for
the blessings He has given us.

Thank you again for being by my side as I’ve served in the Senate.

Happy Thanksgiving to you and your loved ones, Peter.

Sincerely,

Katie Britt

Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

The primary Republican House fundraising committee continues to lag
behind its Democratic counterpart, according to newly released
campaign filings. The National Republican Congressional Committee
(NRCC) reported raising just over $5 million this October while the
Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) raised about $8.1

name: Representative Dan Eubanks
subject: Exciting News from Rep. Dan Eubanks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Eubanks for Mississippi
body:
Greetings friend! State Representative Dan Eubanks here. I wanted to share the good news that YOU WILL have a conservative Republican choice
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.eubanks4mississippi.com/so/1fOi-P5OT/c?w=w44M8upQEKOKwWW8hATBc__RXrIbaym-sH1pgrX7hAU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXViYW5rczRtaXNzaXNzaXBwaS5jb20vc28vMWZPaS1QNU9UP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiYzJiMGE5NTMtMzM0ZC00NDkzLTliZDMtMjA3OGQwMDlmMmQ4In0)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
## I have GREAT NEWS to share!
---
| |
---
| |
### Greetings friend! State Representative Dan Eubanks here. I wanted to share the good news that YOU WILL have a conservative Republican choice in the March presidential/congressional primary. I am campaigning to be your next United States Senator, and want to invite you to come be a part of #TeamEubanks.
###
### I am one of the most conservative legislators in Jackson. My record will show that I have fought hard to protect life, our children, our Constitutional freedoms, family values, and for lower taxes and smaller government. In my last 8 years of public service I have carried the torch for conservative values in Mississippi. In fact, next year I will have the highest lifetime conservative ranking of anyone serving in our state's legislature.
###
I'm writing you today to ask for your prayers for our country and this campaign, and I want to personally ask you for a campaign contribution. Any amount that you choose to give will help fuel our campaign. Together we can drain the swamp, put Americans first, and take our dear country back. May God bless us as we fight, with your help, to keep Mississippi on the right track and to restore "America First" values and common sense in Washington D.C..

---

This is only possible because of you | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73879352/439926051/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI0YTQ5Zi0zYzhhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJ1-GJbbxk91SO-j3wBK-lX7tLEBmexa8AVurnGjVxc=&emci=2969d991-b088-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=d124a49f-3c8a-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | Happy Thanksgiving, team! On this Thanksgiving holiday — from all of us here at The Fairness Project — we wanted to say thank you for your dedication and continued support. **You have helped us to accomplish some pretty amazing things this year, and for that, we are so grateful.** _Grateful_ for protecting the ballot measure process in the highest-contested August special election Ohio has ever seen. _Grateful_ for the ability to kick off campaigns in states like Nebraska and Arizona so we’re in the strongest place starting the 2024 cycle. _Grateful_ for enshrining abortion rights in Ohio’s state constitution. We’re ready for many battles ahead to pass meaningful change and defend the ballot measure process — and friend, we’re proud to have you in the fight for social and economic justice with us. The work we’ve been doing is paying off, and we don’t plan on stopping any time soon. Until then, have a safe and happy holiday with your loved ones, The Fairness Project
---

body:

| Friends,

During this season we recount all of our blessings, and I am very grateful for the opportunity and privilege to serve the people of Arizona’s 6th congressional district.

As we celebrate with family and friends this season, let’s give thanks for those serving in our military, law enforcement, first responders and others in our community who are away from their loved ones keeping us all safe.

Here in the district, I am very grateful for all of you — volunteers, donors, and supporters. Thank you.

>From our family to yours, we wish you a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday!

With gratitude,
The Ciscomani Family

Hi friend, it’s Andrea.
I just wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a very happy and healthy Thanksgiving.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73879418/439926320/809151987?refcode=em_msg_2023.11.23_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzg2MWM5Ni0zZThhLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZoF2yQ4mouDcxqjXPdKoRjqTipkOOMnC18_8MAE06w=)
**I couldn’t be more grateful for your support over the last year.** We’ve faced countless challenges, but this grassroots team has stepped up to the plate to defend our rights, our democracy, our planet, and our community – every single time.

This team makes me hopeful for the future. I know that, with all of you by my side, change is possible in a single generation. I’m eternally thankful to be in this fight with you.

From my family to yours: Have a wonderful, restful Thanksgiving!

With gratitude,

Andrea

From my family to yours

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73879472/439926489/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGJhNGNlMjItM2Y4YS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LZGA79hc9nrfzjeCom0Ipynx3txmAs1Y7_rArRsTdQQ=)
---
Hi, friend.

I just wanted to send you a brief note and wish you a Happy Thanksgiving.

**I’m grateful for my family, my friends, and everyone who has stood with our grassroots movement for a better future.**

Whether you live in the district and voted or volunteered, or if you’ve supported our campaign with a donation from afar, each and every one of you have made a difference for this campaign and this nation. No matter if you’ve given $1 or $1,000, or just your time and attention, you fueled this movement.

**I can’t thank you enough for that.**

So from my family to yours, I’d like to wish you a very Happy Thanksgiving.

Sincerely,

Dr. Raul Ruiz

show your thanks!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57283?t=6&akid=11834%2E878179%2EOvKAP2) We can’t believe how much Biden has done for our country, so we’re sending him a HUGE card to thank him for his hard work!

[**So you’ve been personally selected to sign our letter thanking President Biden for fighting for the American people! Please, we need 10,000 signatures by midnight to demonstrate massive support! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57283?t=7&akid=11834%2E878179%2EOvKAP2) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57283?t=8&akid=11834%2E878179%2EOvKAP2)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I’m so grateful.

**Dear President Biden,

I’m so thankful for everything you’ve done as President!

**Despite MAGA turmoil, over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs for the people.**

I know standing up to MAGA Republican attacks isn’t easy, but it is always the right thing to do.

So as the 2024 race kicks into high gear, I wanted to show my support and thank you for being such an amazing leader for our country!

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the nation who stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you and to keep electing incredible Democrats up and down the ballot »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57283?t=9&akid=11834%2E878179%2EOvKAP2)** | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57283?t=10&akid=11834%2E878179%2EOvKAP2)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11834%2E878179%2EOvKAP2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11834%2E878179%2EOvKAP2).**

name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: A Thanksgiving Wish
body:
www.danielsforcongress.com [www.danielsforcongress.com]
Dear Friend,
Thanksgiving is one of my favorite holidays. It is a time to pause and contemplate all that we have to be thankful for. We also celebrate it by sharing our time and nurture with our loved ones; things that are incredibly valuable but that we may have lost the time to engage in recently.
These last few years have been difficult for many. This Thanksgiving I can’t help but feel that while I have much for which to be grateful, there is still much to be done. The truth is that there IS much to be done, and this Thanksgiving let’s turn our feelings of gratitude into action that improve the quality of life for every American.
As a Council woman for the City of Harrisburg I was lucky to attend the National League of Cities Summit this fall where I had the opportunity to hear Chef Jose Andres, founder of the World’s Central Kitchen. Most of the Conference discussed the gargantuan challenges we face, from a growing unhoused population, to unpredictable climate phenomena, but Chef Jose Andres was focused on how to be better to our fellow human being; that means empowering each other, giving each other hope by ensuring that we all have a role to play in times of crisis, and making sure that we recognize that we all have something to offer each other. This year, for example, he will be making a Turkey Paella fusing his American and Spanish cuisine.
So this Thanksgiving I wish you more than health, happiness and good company. I wish you the ability to rise to the occasion these times ask of us, doing everything in your power to ensure that the world becomes a peaceful one, and making room for those who are coming to the American table, because we know a Thanksgiving dinner is better the more dishes there are.
From my family to yours, happy Thanksgiving!
Shamaine
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106
