name: Don Huffines
subject: Open borders have brought America to its knees
body:
From my family to yours, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving and a restful holiday!
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-viitylt-yuddtktydi-yh/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-r/) FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Noah Betz; 281-928-2089
[noah@bluestonecreatives.com](mailto:noah@bluestonecreatives.com) Hello fellow patriot!I love Thanksgiving--such a great opportunity to be with our family.There is nothing more important than the traditional family. It is the pillar of society and the foundation of our health, religion, and education. We need to celebrate that this weekend!From my family to yours, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving and a restful holiday!I have a short email for y'all today - below is a link to my latest commentary in The Telegraph on Texas taking back control of the border. **For once, we have some good news!** Additionally, listen to my latest segment with Kenny Webster on why "Republicans" **KILLED** school choice in Texas. **Open Borders Have Brought America to Its Knees** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-y/)
# No country has done more to undermine our sovereignty than Mexico. It's time to take back control.
"There is one thing of which I am sure: Texans are about to begin a new, very important chapter in our history; and this time, we are not asking permission - from Mexico or the federal government."_[Click here to r](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-j/)_ _[ead my latest commentary on the border invasion in The Telegraph](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-t/)._ **Texas Republicans KILLED School Choice** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-i/) Education freedom is the main equalizer that gives all Texans an equal opportunity to succeed.Rich folks can change their zip code or go to private schools; it's bizarre the Leftists and RINOs are committed to ensuring the poor remain poor._[WATCH: My discussion with Kenny Webster on the fight for school choice in Texas](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-h/)_ **What I 'm Thankful for This Thanksgiving** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-k/) From my beautiful wife to my five kids and six grands, I am blessed.[_Click here to hear what I am grateful for--personally and politically._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-u/) May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines
_Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator_ P.S. Follow me on [Facebook](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-o/), [Instagram](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-b/), and [Twitter](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-n/) for updates. Your family and friends can join this email list by [clicking here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-p/).Want me to speak at your event? Join your podcast? [Click here to fill out my request form.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-x/) [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT TO SAVE TEXAS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-c/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-q/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-a/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-f/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-z/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-v/) | **[ABOUT](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-e/) | [NEWS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-s/) | [EVENTS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-g/) | [SPEAKER/MEDIA REQUEST](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-w/) | [DONATE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-viitylt-yuddtktydi-yd/)** [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-viitylt-17329976-yuddtktydi-yk) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-viitylt-yuddtktydi-yu/)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

I wish you and your family a wonderful Thanksgiving! Today is dedicated to cherishing moments with your loved ones and celebrating the joys of life.

I am grateful to serve the people in our district, for the chance to keep fighting for you and addressing the significant challenges we face. Thank you for your ongoing support, it is greatly appreciated.

Have a happy and safe holiday.

With gratitude,

Mike Thompson

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | I just wanted to reach out and wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving!

This has been a long year, but **I am thankful for all of the progress we have made** toward a brighter future not just in New Jersey, but across the country.

**I’m thankful for you**. Without grassroots supporters like you, we wouldn’t be able to fight to protect our Jersey Values. I’m grateful for the chance to keep on fighting for you and tackling the big problems we face as a nation.

And most of all, **I’m thankful for my family**. As we begin to see more people again, I am incredibly grateful to be surrounded by so many of my loved ones this Thanksgiving.

Thank you so much for your continued support, and I hope you have a happy and safe holiday.

Yours,

Josh Gottheimer

clean_body: | | I just wanted to reach out and wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving! This has been a long year, but I am thankful for all of the progress we have made toward a brighter future not just in New Jersey, but across the country. I’m thankful for you. Without grassroots supporters like you, we wouldn’t be able to fight to protect our Jersey Values. I’m grateful for the chance to keep on fighting for you and tackling the big problems we face as a nation. And most of all, I’m thankful for my family. As we begin to see more people again, I am incredibly grateful to be surrounded by so many of my loved ones this Thanksgiving. Thank you so much for your continued support, and I hope you have a happy and safe holiday. Yours, Josh Gottheimer | * PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

The colonial origins of Thanksgiving are not usually the first thing that Americans consider when celebrating today's holiday. But they're tough to overlook in a year threatening to repeat yet another [indigenous genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/a1d6328e-066b-4dcd-a800-4ff6652f03c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while bearing witness to an accelerating [ecocide](https://substack.com/redirect/767c5035-b5f8-4771-ba1a-0fc6e3c04f11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) engineered by Wall Street and the Pentagon.
Personally, I struggle with maintaining hope given my dismal view of human nature, institutional cooptation, and the various threats facing the future. While there are plenty of reasons to mourn today's holiday, however, it also offers a useful reminder to recognize blessings that we might otherwise overlook.
Thank you for reading! This post is public, and addresses themes that many of us are struggling with. Feel free to share it!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=139115810&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5MTE1ODEwLCJpYXQiOjE3MDA3NzgzODEsImV4cCI6MTcwMzM3MDM4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.5qsTfIdEM6a05qHoTs4q_2W-IuHRzgA8nMGZbsXWwqQ)
First, I'll offer a few general thoughts on today's holiday articulated in a previous post.
## [Thanksgiving, Thangs Taken, and Why I'm Grateful Today](https://substack.com/redirect/cb82d58b-4908-407e-a4ec-4914fecb859c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/profile/10904314-shahid-buttar)| | *
---|---|---
| November 24, 2022
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cb82d58b-4908-407e-a4ec-4914fecb859c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[I've taken to calling today's holiday #ThangsTaken, in a reference to its colonial and ultimately genocidal origins. I'll share a video below offering a painfully poignant explanation by indigenous youth of an often overlooked history, before returning to some reasons why I feel gratitude today despite the racist roots of the holiday.](https://substack.com/redirect/cb82d58b-4908-407e-a4ec-4914fecb859c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/cb82d58b-4908-407e-a4ec-4914fecb859c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### Reasons we might all feel gratitude in 2023
Despite the multiple crises confronting our country and our communities, 2023 has witnessed some national milestones that are worth widely celebrating.
* Most recently, a [ceasefire in Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/629b7e8b-34ce-41fa-9844-325ce6d82b07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has put a halt (for now) to a murderous bombing campaign by a nuclear superpower targeting a disenfranchised people who were violently forced to flee their ancestral homeland 75 years ago. That victory for peace and human rights was not the product of any official's acumen, but rather the sustained pressure of a [grassroots movement of millions](https://substack.com/redirect/97b3561e-a94b-43f4-afa8-b34f3c7f78e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) around the world who collectively forced Washington's hand.
* Historic [strikes by workers](https://substack.com/redirect/b8b3f789-2222-43cf-9133-9485a037efee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the automotive and entertainment sectors brought major corporations to their knees, and secured better contract provisions for hundreds of thousands of workers. They might have also helped foster a new generation of labor militance informed by the broader [potential of intersectoral solidarity](https://substack.com/redirect/9ec27316-823e-4cdc-9994-4cd34e5a98f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* Two federal agencies charged with enforcing [antitrust laws](https://substack.com/redirect/1a53b28c-7f9e-4d0c-92c5-f29d8e90d182?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) stepped forward more aggressively than they have in decades, filing major [lawsuits against corporations](https://substack.com/redirect/21dce241-05d3-4988-8c3c-89b37e682385?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) including [Google](https://substack.com/redirect/8a9ac6ee-764c-4fb5-9abf-d27434d1230d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Microsoft, and Facebook / Meta. These lawsuits alone won't restore any meaningful balance between the 1% and the 99%, but if successful, they could represent a leap towards reshaping the economy and curtailing corporate power.
* Despite [profound dysfunction](https://substack.com/redirect/9bbc5859-ea94-476c-9c89-32fd01b0ea99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Washington that has revealed our country's regrettable weakness to the rest of the world, Congress [recently managed to get its act together](https://substack.com/redirect/4028766d-2714-455a-b17d-3ccde3a0a325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and actually funded the government...for the next 3 months.

Want to stay informed about views that often go overlooked? Sign up for a free subscription, or become a paid subscriber to support my work. I'm grateful, among other things, for each of the 22,000 subscribers to this newsletter!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WaRRM0zPUkuA0ZtobxcnZW6OQp-mU3hqGGHOVeL2aSI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=139115810)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d872d60-9728-44d5-9c53-cef820540e2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xydmdl-didthutlhu-k/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xydmdl-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,
### Today, we are thankful for you!
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xydmdl-didthutlhu-y/)
### We are wishing you and yours enjoy a happy, safe, and healthy Thanksgiving Day!
### We hope that you are as thankful for the country that we live in as we are, and that you are ready to do your part--leading up to Election 2024--to help us keep America free.
[VOLUNTEER TODAY](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xydmdl-didthutlhu-j/)
### Thank you and God bless your family!
### -Team WisGOP

| | Patriot,

---
When the sitting President is trying to take everything from you – _your freedom, your rights, your business, and hurt your family_ – it would be easy to say that there’s nothing to be grateful for on this Thanksgiving today...
---
...But that couldn’t be further from the truth.

---
Even during the darkest moments, there will always be something to be grateful for.

---
And this Thanksgiving, I can truly say that I am grateful for my supporters like YOU.

---
As the entire Justice Department bears down on me despite having committed no crime, I can rest assured knowing that millions and millions of Americans have my back.

---
I see it in the polls that show we’re crushing Crooked Joe by massive numbers no one even thought possible.

---
But, more importantly, it’s clear when I travel the country and receive so much love and support from the great patriots of our nation who are just as committed as you and I are to saving America.

---
Right now, we are sadly a nation in decline. We are a nation that is dying from crippling inflation, a wide-open border, radical, politically correct left-wing ideology that poisons everything it touches, and clueless and corrupt politicians who are pushing us to the brink of World War III.

---
President Abraham Lincoln revived the American tradition of Thanksgiving at a time when our nation had endured one of its greatest hardships. Just like President Washington before him, he urged his fellow citizens to say THANK YOU to God for our many blessings.

---
While a dark cloud hangs over our country right now, today I’m sharing with you a message of hope that we will save our nation, and together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

---
_If you’re doing poorly right now given that our nation is sadly in decline, please stop reading here. I sincerely mean it. Enjoy Thanksgiving, and do not forget that the best is yet to come!_

---
